classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's customer service, technology, and reliability across multiple operational dimensions.

content.body: The ShipBob team has been wonderful to work with. They are hands-on and fast to respond, resulting in a smooth integration!   Our rep, Samantha R. has given us the gold standard of customer service. She has repeatedly helped us with challenging orders & ensured the best customer care for our clients.  I highly recommend!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's fulfillment services and customer service quality, with no indication of dissatisfaction or intent to switch providers.

content.body: RUN! RUN AS FAST AS YOU CAN! I really do feel bad for you if you have already signed a contract with shipbob, this is the worst fulfillment center you will ever find. Hopefully you can find a way out before it's too late. I will say the company was not always this bad. 2 years ago Shipbob was smaller and they actually did a ton to care for their customers and they took pride in doing good work. Come to present day and they have been sitting on a container of our product for 6 days now and still haven't even stored it let alone shipped. We are literally begging for an update and all they do is send us links to their SLA. We get it, however, our agent promised us this was priority and turns out that was NOT the case. I guess this is what happens when you put profits over customer experience. Plus, its not just us look at all of the most recent reviews. To make matter worse their shipping rates are extremely expensive and they constantly lose product. NO JOKE, this year they lost an entire skew of ours and we had to tell our most important customer than none of his 17 clubs would get the product. He was blown away that a center could be so careless and he laughed at us when we said we used shipbob. He called them the " NIGHTMARE OF FULFILLMENT CENTERS" lol In closing I am writing this to all of the entrepreneurs out there considering shipbob as a partner. You have worked your butt off to get where you are, poured your heart into your brand, don't make the mistake of going with a company that will destroy your brand image. Go find a partner that will help your hard work pay off.

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking to leave ShipBob due to severe fulfillment delays, lost inventory, high shipping costs, and poor customer service, and is warning others to avoid the company.

content.body: I have had this app for 1yr, so i did give them a good chance. Forget the app, there is much better out there loads. READ THE 1 STAR REVIEWS .ALL OF THEM,1 thing in common, they have the worst customer service, of any company i have dealt with, i had 3 small issues , so i was patient but this 3rd issue is costing me alot of money. now which is the only reason i a, writing this review. this is the 1st bad review i have wrote. Save yourself time and money. ITs not even worth having there free plan, customer support is too bad , really bad, no contact for days, then don't answer your question, then dont fix the issue, i have literally just got my other e-commerce shop owners, all 27 shops to all switch from this too SHIPPING IS EASY.. so much better app ,and customer support the best . Go read there reviews you will thank me

classification.summary: Customer is actively switching to a competitor due to poor customer service and unresolved issues that cost them money, and has already migrated 27 shops away from the current app.

content.body: I dont' like writing bad reviews but my experience with Easyship has been unbelievably bad. I launched my store, got my first order and what do you know? I can't ship anything. Apparently it's a problem at the back end but more than 24 hours later, I still don't have a resolution and have been told by customer service that I'm in a queue. I was also given a run down of the tech team's meeting on a Monday morning (supposedly so I'd know I wasn't first - or a priority). Put simply, I'm paying for a service that I cannot use. I'm in New Zealand by the way - so would definitely recommend that other NZ businesses look elsewhere.

classification.summary: Customer cannot use Easyship's service due to backend issues and poor support response, actively seeking alternatives.

content.body: I removed it after struggling soo much with the shipping.. It won't ship anything, anywhere and it's just bad business for small and new stores who try to grow up! Every time I open the app, it asks me to reconnect to my shop, I have to re-do the settings over and over again and it's for nothing... Waste of money and time!! Time is money! Save yourself!

classification.summary: Small ecommerce store owner is abandoning their current fulfillment solution due to persistent shipping failures, app connectivity issues, and poor ROI, and is actively seeking an alternative.

content.body: Shipbob has put our amazon account in jeopardy with a 16% late ship rate. Technical support is a carousel that goes nowhere. They have an online "chat" window, where the representative does basically nothing but open a support ticket - which go unanswered. Additionally, they sent boxes of assembly parts to a customer (who had no idea why he got these miscellaneous plastic rings). This led to us having to product to assemble, costing us revenue. Most importantly, just google "Shipbob" and "BBB" and read the number of Better Business Bureau horror stories about Shipbob. Or just look at reviews and see how horrific the stories are. The onboarding is very slick, they put a lot of energy into getting you on, but they can't get products out, nor do they offer technical support that is useful or helpful.

classification.summary: A brand is urgently seeking to switch 3PL providers due to ShipBob's high late ship rates (16%), poor technical support, fulfillment errors, and negative BBB reputation that is jeopardizing their Amazon account.

content.body: As a small business trying to expand globally, Easyship has been amazing at making international shipping headache-free. The personalised support we have gotten our account manager Krish has really simplified and enhanced our experience. We will definitely continue to use Easyship's services for years to come!

classification.summary: WildBoarGames is praising Easyship's international shipping services and account management support, with no indication of dissatisfaction or interest in switching providers.

content.body: I worked with several fulfilment centers in my career and never had a worse experience than with ShipBob. Our company kept receiving complaints from DTC customers that were receiving products heavily stained, dented and damaged, covered in black dust that looked like soot. We placed a number of trial orders and had the same issue every single time, products arriving in horrible conditions. After asking ShipBob multiple times for an explanation, product audit and resolution, we waited months and finally received appalling pictures that showed our expensive products "stored" in haphazard mounds on top of each other in filthy boxes on the floor. It was evident from the pictures that many units were stained, dented, broken, leaked. We requested a report of damaged vs salable units and a credit for the damages. After over three months, we still have received no answers on the counts and were told that all of our damages are due to a mysterious "manufacturing defect" and Ship Bob is refusing to cover for any of it. These are thousands upon thousands of dollars of loss plus DTC customers being lost due to the poor experience. Further to this, the customer service is absolutely useless for any matter beyond the simplest things and will just provide pointless "cut and paste" answers that do not resolve your issues. I absolutely DO NOT recommend this company to anyone who values their business and brand equity. I wish I could attach the horrible pictures for everyone to see.

classification.summary: Company suffered severe product damage and storage issues at ShipBob with thousands in losses and poor customer service, actively seeking alternative fulfillment solutions.

content.body: EasyShip have been a fantastic partner for our brand. As a small startup, we had numerous areas we have to cover, many which were outside our wheelhouse. We found EasyShip and they helped us incorporate our fulfillment and order processing flow with ease. They offer great customer service and support, going above and beyond to help us get up to speed and ensure our logistics were covered. Thanks EasyShip!

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising EasyShip's fulfillment and order processing services for helping their startup scale logistics operations.

content.body: If Zero starts was possible i will give it. Unless you are interested in ruining your business i will deeply suggest that you don't use shipbob. I read all the bad reviews online and still ignored it. Please don't be like me. Shipbob as completely ruined my business and left me with a chain of angry customers. For a whole month, all my international orders where shipped and automatically returned to sender. This is terrible because international shipping with shipbob costs a fortune. How can a business survive this. Let me explain how terrible this is. i spend $20 plus on ship an order that cost $60 including shipping fee. Shipbob ships the item unsuccessfully and then charge me $20 to return the item and now wants to charge me another $20 to reship the item. So basically i have lost $60 for every international order i got. That almost a $6000 dollar loss because this happened with close to 100 orders in one month. My terrible experience with shipbob has sent me into terrible depression. It has been the worst experience of my life. My paypal account and stripe is ruined because of multiple disputes due to lost packages and undelivered items. Please do not use shipbob, they will ruin your life and the business you've worked so hard to build.

classification.summary: User experienced catastrophic failures with ShipBob's international shipping services resulting in ~$6,000 in losses and is actively warning others to avoid the service.

content.body: Very intuitive and easy to use! The tech support team is also responsive within 24 hours. I'd recommend!

classification.summary: War Locker is satisfied with an intuitive platform and responsive tech support, recommending the service to others.

content.body: I use this app to help fulfill our orders efficiently. It has worked great in the 3+ months that I have been working where I currently am. So far I have not had any real issues with Easyship.

classification.summary: User is satisfied with their current fulfillment app (Easyship) and has had no issues over 3+ months of use.

content.body: I'm hoping it gets better but looking bad so far. My first order sat for four days before they shipped it out. One of things most advertised about ShipBob for Shopify store owners is their direct integration with the stores. That does not seem to include tracking notifications to the customer, so now instead of fulfilling orders, I'm constantly checking my phone waiting for confirmation that an order was eventually shipped so I can send to my customer. Got a bad feeling about this.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with ShipBob's slow fulfillment (4-day delays) and lack of shipping notification integration, forcing them to manually track orders instead of automating the process.

content.body: DO NOT go with Shipbob. Several hidden fees that they were not transparent about before coming onboard. If you're an apparel brand or any brand with several SKUs (i.e. size/color combinations), their warehousing costs are astronomical. They are 6X the price of my previous warehouse and cost more than rent for an entire house in the area. I'm moving my inventory ASAP and deeply regret the headache and money its costs me moving to Shipbob.

classification.summary: Apparel brand actively moving away from ShipBob due to excessive hidden fees and astronomical warehousing costs that are 6X their previous provider, particularly problematic for multi-SKU inventory.

content.body: We've been using Easyship for almost 2 years - it's been a game changer for optimizing our postage spend. The integration with Shopify works really well, and the customer service is excellent. Our CSM is super responsive, and always willing to help with any issues that come up.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Easyship's postage optimization, Shopify integration, and customer service, with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: ShipHero to the rescue. The app has a great UI, which makes it super easy to train our employees to use the new system. Our onboarding specialist was super helpful and a blast to work with. I will say it does seem like sometimes they will push new updates and sometimes those updates can cause the app to act a little buggy. Their support is good and they normally will have a fix or solution that day. Definitly I would say for small to medium size businesses this app is awesome.

classification.summary: YoungLA is satisfied with ShipHero's UI and support but occasionally experiences bugs after updates, though they find it suitable for small to medium businesses.

content.body: On the Inventory distribution side of things, Shipmonk has made it really easy to send inventory and determine its levels. Its' platform if very user friendly as it provides useful metrics such as stockout days and low inventory levels. The happiness engineers are awesome at providing help and clarification on any of our company's requests.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's inventory distribution platform, user-friendly metrics, and customer support quality.

content.body: We've been with ShipMonk for awhile now and they have been absolutely wonderful! When we first partnered with them they were a bit smaller and still somewhat new, since then they've grown into a larger 3PL company, with updated backend apps/software, more staff, more features, warehouses, better prices, etc. The backend software/dashboard is intuitive, constantly getting updated, it shows your whole business at a glance and is easy to see and edit your orders from a birds-eye-view. After the initial onboarding process, everything integrates perfectly with Shopify. We've personally had little to no problems with ShipMonk themselves, errors are usually caused by USPS or other shipping companies. When we do have an issue or concern, the "Happiness Engineers" at ShipMonk are phenomenal, they're your personal point of contact and you really establish a good relationship with these engineers, they can help you with anything you need to ensure things go smoothly and they respond very quickly. Overall, we're very happy with the service from ShipMonk. With any 3PL you will run into issues here and there, it's a complicated logistical system shipping millions of packages a year, but with ShipMonk, together we've ironed out the initial issues and have been smooth sailing to success!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer shares their positive experience with the 3PL's software, support team, and service improvements over time.

content.body: Look somewhere else! Average 2-3 days just to pick and pack product, their shipping partner is super slow and will lose 1/50 packages, went from 4-5 day delivery average doing it in house with usps and now with shipbob 10-20 day. Shipping times are huge with e-commerce! Implementation process was a mess also.

classification.summary: Current 3PL provider (ShipBob) is causing significant delays in fulfillment and shipping times, leading to worse delivery performance than in-house operations, prompting search for better alternatives.

content.body: The Easyship app and the company really make it easy to sync our orders with our 3PL provider and prepare shipments with our support team. It saves our team a lot of time with fulfilling orders and automatically calculates shipping rates for our customers during checkout. Our new account manager Melody has done a great job of proactively reaching out, checking in and helping solve outstanding issues. Where she could not solve, she would involve the right people on her team to look into the issue. We have had a great experience with Melody and Easyship team!

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Easyship's order syncing, shipping automation, and excellent account management support.

content.body: Avoid ShipBob at all Costs. 1) We shipped to 2 of their warehouses, they lost all of the inventory in 1 of the warehouses and then took THREE months to find it. 2) They say they can ship in your custom shipping box. They can't. No matter what they say they can't. They mailed our customers our product in a generic box and inside that generic box they put our custom box unfolded... as if the customer had ordered an empty box. 3) Their customer service is absolutely unable to help with anything -- all of these errors they create are your problem to resolve. ShipBob customer service will tell you they are "working on it" or "sent it to the team that can resolve it". Nothing will happen and this will / has been going on for FOUR months. Literally. An entire season. As a small business owner time is everything. And ShipBob seems to have no respect for that and worse yet they are unable to do the very thing they advertise: fulfill your orders. Go somewhere else and hire literally any other fulfillment service and save yourself months of headache and frustration.

classification.summary: Small business owner is actively seeking to switch from ShipBob due to months of critical failures in inventory management, custom packaging, and customer service.

content.body: With a few back and forths with the support, I got the answers I needed from easy ship to help my business. They had a good shipping process and it made everything headache-free which is important when starting a business. I would recommend Easyship to businesses. Make sure you have everything in your store and optimise as much as possible as Easyship made us increase our customer experience and conversion rate.

classification.summary: Flow Co. based in Australia is praising Easyship's shipping process and customer support for helping their ecommerce business improve conversion rates.

content.body: Used Easyship for Paire's fulfilment, love the tagging feature, easy to manage different tasks. Received great service from our account manager as well.

classification.summary: Paire is satisfied with Easyship's fulfillment service, praising their tagging features and account manager support.

content.body: Shipmonk has stupid high shipping. I have products that cost up to $100 to ship and they split it into two shipments AND charge the fulfillment fee for each. Which ends up being an additional $9. You will be paying the fulfillment fee monthly whether you ship the items or not. These fees are the same price as the storage fees so storage is double the price they say it is. Another thing about storage is that the allowable height of a pallet is on the lower side meaning they charge more than you can find elsewhere per pallet. When I started with them, they would reply to my emails and tickets within 24 hrs and now it takes them 4+ days. Many of the questions I ask them are for customers of mine (sometimes shipping delays and even not receiving). And then I often end up just giving my customers their money back While I wait for Shipmonk's reply. I found a company that has cheaper storage (larger pallets for same monthly fee) plus they don't charge the additional fulfillment fees AND they don't have a minimum monthly order. (The storage is literally half the price) And a HUGE advantage of this new company is the amazingly lower shipping cost. This $100 Shipping cost plus $9 fulfillment fees through Shipmonk is now only costing me a total of $30 with this new company - that includes fulfillment! (Went from $109 to $30) I unfortunately still have products in their warehouse and being charged a stupid amount. I have paid this other fulfillment company to pick them up. I will still need to pay Shipmonk a large amount on top of that for this other company to pick them up. Do not go with Shipmonk!!!

classification.summary: Customer switched from ShipMonk to a competitor due to excessive shipping costs, fulfillment fees, poor customer service response times, and high storage fees, achieving 72% cost savings on fulfillment.

content.body: We've been using Easyship for a couple of years and rely on it daily to ship out our orders. It is very simple to set up and use and the support team is excellent. They are also constantly adding new features and improving the platform which is great to see.

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship user praising the platform's ease of use, support quality, and continuous feature improvements with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: Updated 2022: Since many flights were cancelled so I would like to give this app second chance for international shipping. But you know what? After two years, their customer service is still suck!!! I was not able to receive handover note emails suddenly so I asked for help, but no one can solve my problem and suddenly the customer service disappeared!!!! I have tried to resend emails to ask for the progress but no one replied. So I gave up and after a month, yes a whole month!!! Suddenly one of your customer service asked me if my problem was solved. That's so funny!! Then I replied why they replied my email after a month since no one solved my problem, CS disappeared again!! Old review:Very BAD customer service. It took a week to reply my question, no one can help if you have problem with your shipping. Even they replied, they didn't answer your question directly. BAD!

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with consistently poor customer service responsiveness and lack of effective problem resolution for international shipping issues over a two-year period.

content.body: Really wanted to like this app. Was an early adopter but customer service can be so frustrating. Took way too long to hear back from them. Had an issue where Media Mail became a shipping option (their backend issue) and I lost money on shipping. Took customer service too long to address this. And was never offered a refund. Was supposed to have Chat as an option based on my plan but didn't show up whenever I tried to contact them. Clearly I was not a priority.

classification.summary: Early adopter frustrated with slow customer service response times, unresolved shipping backend issues, lack of promised chat support, and no refund offered for losses incurred.

content.body: As a novice start up entrepreneur I’ve relied heavily on enlisting the right team and technologies for my eCommerce venture. By installing the Easyship app on my store I’ve opened up a whole new world of possibilities for positive customer engagement, seamless shopping cart experiences, reliable warehousing, logistics and shipping. This is backed up with top quality support for store owners. From my perspective the most appealing feature with Easyship is the opportunity for customers to view three attractive options at the checkout: (1) cheapest (2) fastest (3) best value shipping. The added advantage of being able to offer pre-paid taxes, duties and insurance makes this app a winner!

classification.summary: A startup founder is praising Easyship's shipping and fulfillment capabilities, particularly the multi-option checkout feature and support for taxes/duties/insurance.

content.body: Excellent app, easy to integrate and setup. Few issues with the upfront pricing calculation, but the support team are EXCELLENT and quick to fix. I imagine these are more teething issues for the business as it grows. They also helped us find a 3PL that is integrated with EasyShip... it was truly a plug/play. Would highly recommend it.

classification.summary: Tomorrow Skincare had a positive experience with an ecommerce app, praised the support team for resolving pricing issues, and received a referral to an integrated 3PL partner.

content.body: Very useful and helpful for our growing business. The team has been attentive to our needs and when things go wrong, they are quick to step in and address.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's helpful onboarding, third-party warehouse partnerships, and responsive team as their fulfillment needs have expanded.

content.body: Have been an Easyship user since the start. And we can say that they have improved tons and are glad to be witnessing this growth and improvement on their part. Customer support is great despite current supply chain issues.

classification.summary: Satisfied long-term Easyship customer praising their improvements and customer support despite supply chain challenges.

content.body: Best software out there. If you get to work with Mike Azimi for your onboarding then gear up for the best experience of your life.

classification.summary: Existing satisfied customer praising Saltbox's software and onboarding experience with staff member Mike Azimi.

content.body: I used this app since 2019, it works great for all the functions and the dashboard UI is also very easy to work with.

classification.summary: A long-time user praising the app's functionality and user-friendly dashboard with no apparent pain points or switching intent.

content.body: Not rating the app Im rating shipmonk. Please avoid using this fulfillment center for your company if you don’t want to risk going out of business. The worst company I’ve ever worked with. The poorest communication and messed up two huge shipments of my product costing me thousands. I’m still trying to recover

classification.summary: Vakandi Apparel is actively seeking to switch away from ShipMonk due to poor communication and critical fulfillment errors that cost them thousands of dollars.

content.body: This review is primarily for the ShipHero 3PL software. Before moving to ShipHero, we were fulfilling 5K+ orders/mo very manually—no SKUs or inventory tracking, manual 3PL billing for other brands we fulfill for etc. We evaluated several 3PL solutions to help us scale fulfillment our own brands, as well as build out a new warehouse to grow our 3PL company. We finally settled on ShipHero because of the full suite 3PL software they've built rather than using separate apps for what we needed. We scored with Brett Oliveira initially, and then Mike Azimi as our onboarding specialist, and he was AMAZING to work with. The onboarding was super smooth, and we're now shipping 7K+ orders/mo for several brands from our first warehouse running ShipHero within a matter of weeks. Some specific things we really appreciate about ShipHero 3PL software: - Kits! We can create a kit SKU and assign multiple items to be picked/tracked as components in different locations in the warehouse.- The efficiency of the picking flow through the warehouse.- Replenishment reports for optimizing our team to restock pickable locations.- Using Purchase Orders for receiving inventory is super streamlined, and makes it easy for our team to be efficient.- The whole iOS/scanner implementation makes it easy to onboard new employees and make them productive immediately.- Custom orders statuses that we can use to have pickers focus on specific 3PL brands.- Order automation rules for adding SKUs to orders based on the product SKUs (e.g. adding ring box SKUs to ring orders, necklace pouches to necklace orders, etc.)- 3PL billing! We haven’t even scratched the surface yet of all the detailed levels of billing you can apply to your 3PL customers - per pick, n+ picks, bins used in the warehouse, cubic storage used, etc. GREAT STUFF!- There’s bound to be more things here as we explore the software further. The big selling point is that they use their own software in their own warehouses which means they dogwood their own features before providing them to us 3PL software customers. Before we started with ShipHero we visited their Allentown warehouse and got a ton of ideas for how to implement our warehouse layout and workflows. We still have yet to nerd out on Xbox Kinect for our packing stations, but they even have a KB article when we have some time :) We’d definitely recommend ShipHero if you’re looking to scale your 3PL company and want a SAAS solution from a growing company that is continually building features that help you grow with them.

classification.summary: A 3PL company successfully scaled from 5K to 7K+ orders/month using ShipHero software and is satisfied with their warehouse management capabilities.

content.body: This app guided us through all our inventory needs and taught us barcoding and organization. It has made fulfillment so much smoother and efficient for us. Mike A was a great help, he was always available for any questions we had!

classification.summary: Customer is praising Saltbox's inventory management app and exceptional support service, indicating high satisfaction with their fulfillment operations.

content.body: We use the software to organize and manage our warehouse/inventory with barcoded locations and products. The Software is very efficient to use on our iPads and desktop ship stations.It has been a great experience overall with mike being our on-boarding contact he was a pleasure to work with.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's warehouse management software efficiency and positive onboarding experience.

content.body: It's great! I've really enjoyed using Shipbob. They have made it very easy to off load our shipping and the support is great!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their easy-to-use shipping offloading service and strong support.

content.body: Works really well. We have been using for over a year and it is quite reliable and does what we need it to do.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with their current fulfillment solution and has found it reliable over the past year.

content.body: It worked great! We only had one issue with a glitch. It was able to be resolved. Sometimes upsells were not shown on shipbob orders.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied overall but experienced a glitch and upsell display issues with ShipBob orders.

content.body: This integration works perfectly connecting our Shopify store to Ship Bob. We have had zero issues with it--in fact, I barely even knew it was installed since it just works in the background and I've never had to worry about it!

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with their current ShipBob integration and has no issues or needs.

content.body: I have used ShipBob integrated with Shopify in 2 different companies with great success. Highly recommended!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer from Canada is praising the service based on positive experiences with two companies.

content.body: We use Shipbob for all of our fulfillment and warehousing needs. We can confidently rely on them for inventory tracking and receiving inventory.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's fulfillment and warehousing services, particularly praising their inventory tracking and receiving capabilities.

content.body: The public estimate price was $21 cheaper than what was actually quoted once i had signed up for an account. The support representative said the publicly displayed prices are just an estimate. (Even though you put in Origin, Destination and weight) In my case a 0.5kg box with dimensions of 10x10x10cm was $21 different in price? So im not sure what their estimate is based off of, maybe a piece of paper. Classic bait and switch. Uninstalled

classification.summary: Customer experienced significant pricing discrepancy between public estimate ($21 cheaper) and actual quote after account signup, perceiving it as bait-and-switch tactics and uninstalling the service.

content.body: Having used a number of 3PL's over the years we know how hard it is to get a strong 3PL partner. We've been using Shipbob for the last 12 months and they have been a great partner for us. Their level of service and speed at which they get orders out to customers is fantastic (particularly in pandemic times where other 3PL's are struggling to get orders out). Their customer service to merchants is also exceptional. Our account manager Chetan is fantastic, as are Karina and Mahmood in customer service. The only opportunities for us are around streamlining of some administrative processes, which are being addressed by their product team (they're always happy to take onboard any challenge we have and get the product team involved) and price of storage is higher than other 3PL's (but this is because they want quick turns on inventory and don't want it sitting around). Overall, we're very pleased with our partnership with Shipbob.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob customer is very satisfied with their 3PL partner but notes that storage pricing is higher than competitors, though they accept this trade-off for faster inventory turns.

content.body: We have been using ShipBob for over 3 years now as our 3PL. The integration to Shopify is super user friendly and their customer service/support is very helpful. Highly Recommended.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob customer praising their 3PL service and Shopify integration with no indication of switching needs.

content.body: Been using ShipBob as our 3PL for almost a year now and they have been awesome! The app does an awesome job of keeping everything organized and easily viewable, and the team is always open to new suggestions. I look forward to continuing our growth with ShipBob!

classification.summary: Satisfied ShipBob customer praising their 3PL service and app functionality while expressing intent to continue growing with them.

content.body: We've been using ShipBob as our USA 3PL for around 8 months and they've been awesome. Looking to expand into Canada using their services as well. Our customer success manager, Chetan has been invaluable. The app itself is very intuitive and if there is ever an issue, it's easy to get in touch with support to sort things out for you.

classification.summary: Shakti Mat USA is satisfied with ShipBob's 3PL services and looking to expand into Canada, not actively seeking alternatives.

content.body: ShipBob's software is great. App setup is simple and easy. Very intuitive and functional. We've been using it for years and have seen how their product team continues to improve it month after month.

classification.summary: ZBiotics is a satisfied long-term ShipBob customer praising their software quality and continuous product improvements.

content.body: Shipbob is an incredible 3PL. They have helped us in many ways with scaling our business. They provide great insights, communication, and always hit their SLA's. I would recommend them to anyone looking to take their business to the next level.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their 3PL services and recommending them for business scaling.

content.body: I was really excited to work with Shipmonk, their service seemed really great. However after 1 year with them I'm canceling my contract because of the constant loss of inventory that has occurred. Pros: Easy to use integrated software that syncs with Shopify and also automatically downloads my Etsy orders. Inventory tracking feature that updated my Shopify stock. When everything went well, being a Shipmonk customer was great. Orders were automatically fulfilled and it saved hours of work. Cons: They lost thousands of dollars of inventory over the course of a year, a fraction of which was reimbursed. When you sign up for their service the terms and conditions say that even though they might be at fault for lost inventory, they are not financially responsible. It was incredibly frustrating having to email their customer service every week to report an inventory discrepancy. I sell unique clothing designs that have a high production cost so I suspect staff members were stealing my products each time an order was fulfilled. Their Happiness Engineers were always very apologetic each time I reported a claim, but failed to solve the issue or explain why my inventory continually went missing in their warehouses. The rare times that Shipmonk did agree to reimburse me, they only gave me a $10 credit per unit which was a small percentage of the production cost. The lost inventory has negatively impacted my business' reputation. Because of Shipmonk's errors, each month I had to message customers to apologize that their orders could no longer be fulfilled. Many of the missing products were irreplaceable. Their software syncing system would list products as in stock on my website, then suddenly change to an inventory level of 0 when the order was being fulfilled, changing the order status to backordered. Because of Shipmonk's negligence, I've lost thousands of dollars worth of sales plus thousands in lost inventory.

content.body: SHIPBOB Australia B2C Fulfilment ex Altona Warehouse - Absolute HORROR!We used shipbob for just under 6 months via WIX and Shopify Store. Originally attracted by what appears a solid and streamlined Tech Platform with experienced fulfilment providers for reasonable and transparent cost.Having experienced shipbob for months we offer our strong warning to store operators. Every Warehouse receiving order was either lost for 7 days and took a further 7-14 days until the stock was listed in inventory for dispatch. On one occasion the warehouse told the delivery contractor they will not accept anything via Shipbob which was the indication for us to make an urgent move.As to the actual picking and shipping of our orders their service appeared efficient and good (but our customers did not take kindly to excessive delays with receiving of good into the FC). We had countless email communication with the support team who seem to be the go-between melbourne warehouse and US operations team. Once they ran out of excuses they just started to ignore us which made it a nightmare for us as we had no information to give our customers. In general terms we would say Shipbob will be unlikely to survive in Australia and they present a real danger to any business that makes the mistake top rely on them. And in the end we lost many orders because of them and scored the anger of many customers whilst Shipbob did not feel the need to compensate us even with a dollar.

classification.summary: Australian business warning others about ShipBob's severe warehouse receiving delays and poor support, having already switched providers.

content.body: Great app and service, way to get your cost of shipping down. The team there is awesome and always here to help. Customer service is responsive and efficient. If you are looking at improving your shipping process, no doubt you should at least take some time to talk with them.

content.body: ZERO stars. Despite the many negative reviews of feed syncing issues and money lost due to incorrect shipment rates provided to customers, I gave this app a try. Time between my first ticket and the last correspondence from them (in which they finally showed signs of troubleshooting) was 7 weeks. Not to mention the money I lost due to incorrect EasyShip rates being displayed to customers...rates EasyShip refuses to make good since I refuse to reactivate their integration on my store given the above. I will absolutely not risk further customer dissatisfaction to my business and will be recommending others do not make the same mistake.

classification.summary: Customer experienced significant technical issues, financial losses, and poor support response times with EasyShip app and is actively seeking alternative solutions after disengaging from the service.

content.body: Easyship is a COMPLETE game changer for international shipping. No one else offers the option to pay for duties and taxes up front for a completely transparent shipping experience. Generating labels for 4x7 thermal printer2. Calculating live shipping rates at checkout in my Shopify store3. Clear setup of products and boxes for accurate shipping rates4. Ability to offer free shipping up to a certain amount #2 was especially huge for me as I did not want customers to get unexpected shipping prices, as I'm still learning how to ship things I am not confident yet in what my shipping rates were. I did a test shipment to myself and it was seamless, it's everything I could ask for right off the bat.

classification.summary: Plyco is praising their migration to Easyship and expressing satisfaction with their current logistics solution, not indicating interest in alternatives.

content.body: I have been running businesses for 30+ years, and I can say, without a doubt, that no single business I have ever worked with has damaged the reputation of my company more than ShipMonk. Make no mistake, ShipMonk is a sales company, and cares very little for their customers once they have signed you up. I strongly urge you to go back through Shopify’s reviews from 2020 and early 2021. Recently, the reviews are all “miraculously” five-stars, and do not sound authentic….sound a bit more like advertisements than reviews. Who knows, maybe these vendors have had experiences with a ShipMonk from an alternate universe. And i would not buy the "COVID, COVID, COVID, we have addressed those issues" line. A Zebra does not change its stripes. Here are my experiences…judge for yourself and beware before getting in bed with these guys. Also check out their reviews on Google. All of my experiences outlined below are well-documented, and if you check out other reviews, you will see similarly bad experiences, though maybe not in as much detail! ShipMonk’s systems are poorly designed, their internal communications are terrible, their email system is very inefficient and frustrating to use, and their customer service is atrocious, both in terms of response time, getting accurate information and maybe most importantly, attitude. It is extremely slow…be prepared to wait sometimes days for a response, which is often unhelpful or inaccurate, and then wait again for their response to your response, etc., etc. Many of their customer service reps are poorly trained, often not knowing answers to basic questions or, worse, delivering incorrect information, and it is almost as if they have been trained to take any opportunity to blame the customer for any issues that arise. All of this adds up to a terrible customer experience, a lot of frustration and stress, and often requires hours each week to sort out their mess, all the while fielding phone calls from unhappy customers due to shipping errors and delayed shipments. A fulfillment center should be taking fulfillment issues off your desk, so you can focus on your business. With ShipMonk, hours a week are spent double checking their work or trying to get them to do what they are supposed to do on time and without being asked. I was with ShipMonk for about a year and a half. They initially flat out misrepresented their capabilities to me. I see from WAMA Underwear’s review, that ShipMonk is still habitually misrepresenting their services in order to sign up new clients. Like WAMA’s, their misrepresentation to us was not discovered, of course, until all of our inventory had arrived at their warehouse. They made very little effort, or displayed any urgency, to rectify the situation, and made no offer to reduce their cost of service, which went up substantially due to their misrepresentation of what they could and could not do, and at what price. All the while, their auto-payment systems keeps pulling funds from your account, while getting any kind of solution drags on and on. I gave them multiple opportunities, and tried to work with them, to make things right, but they were clearly not interested and could not be bothered. It seems their sole focus is signing up new clients, and not providing good service with a good attitude to the clients they have signed up. They have almost an adversarial relationship with their customers, as if you are just a necessary evil to generate revenue and grow. We make and sell an exercise systems. ShipMonk sent our customers, among other things, a dress, a purse, a sweatshirt and tap shoes…yes, tap shoes. They always send you a form apology email, letting you know how they are working to see that this does not happen again…until it happens again. Mispicks, missing items and wrong sizes were also a common problem. Their time estimates for special projects are not to be taken seriously. They almost never meet their own estimate, and instead, deliver excuse after excuse. You cannot rely on their status updates to communicate with your customers, because you have no idea if they will do what they said they will do when they said they will do it, leading to upset customers who rightfully blame you. The costs they charged us for special projects were grossly over-charged, and only after I discovered them and brought it to their attention, did they acknowledge as much. To this day, it is not clear to me whether we were ever refunded the overcharges, and we spent months, yes months, just trying to establish a fair charge for the work (we decided to leave before that was resolved). They provide very little transparency in regards to their costs and pricing…you have to dig into their reporting for the information. Though they have many shipping options, they are rarely the most cost effective. Since leaving, we have found significantly cheaper and more cost-effective rates, faster shipping and improved reliability. The attractive shipping options they quote are before carrier surcharges, which can be as much as 50-80% of the shipping cost itself. They partnered with several carriers during our time with them, who were flat out incompetent, lost packages, did not provide adequate tracking, etc. And ShipMonk will not allow you to follow up on your own to get tracking updates from carriers directly, so you must suffer through waiting for ShipMonk to follow up, which takes up valuable time and rarely delivers any actionable information. ShipMonk does not seem to understand, or more likely does not really care, that they are representing you, their customer, in the marketplace. When they screw up, or take days to get back to you, or ship tap shoes to your customers, the customer does not blame ShipMonk…they only know that you screwed up their order. Such is life with ShipMonk. I hope you find this information valuable. I thought it was important to share my experience in detail with you, to expose what I believe to be a very poorly run and untrustworthy company in the fulfillment space. There are plenty of fulfillment companies in the marketplace, and if you do your homework, you can likely find ones who pride themselves on customer service, and doing their job competently as an integral part of your business. And if something does go wrong, will give it and you the attention you deserve. In our experience, ShipMonk is not one of those companies. They are a sales company trying to grow as fast as they can, and you, as their customer, are of little consequence.

classification.summary: Long-time business owner seeking to switch from ShipMonk due to poor systems, slow/inaccurate customer service, and significant reputation damage to their company.

content.body: How switching to ShipHero transformed our business in 90 days My skincare brand BlackWolfNation.com was doing very basic in-house fulfillment using ShipStation. We grew from 20 orders a day to over 1000 in just 12 months and needed a more robust solution to continue growing. Working with Shiphero we were able to implement a receiving ASN system, warehouse locations, faster and more accurate pick, pack, and ship procedures, rate shopping, and setting up bundled components for accurate inventory. ShipHero is a very powerful out-of-the-box solution that paid for itself instantly. With the help of the Shiphero team, we then transformed our in-house fulfillment operation into ONE23 Fulfillment - a thriving 3PL business within 90-days. We now ship for many top DTC brands and are pushing out thousands of orders a day. This is an extremely scalable solution that continues to innovate and add new features. Onboarding new clients, portal access, and billing are all fantastic. Without ShipHero we never could have grown as fast as we have or had the confidence to implement it in the first place and get the most out of the platform. All I can say is we are thankful for ShipHero every day.

classification.summary: A skincare brand successfully scaled from in-house fulfillment to a 3PL business using ShipHero, demonstrating the need for robust fulfillment solutions that support rapid growth and advanced features.

content.body: The app is amazing! It has a lot of features that you can use and can make your daily fulfillment of orders fast and easy! Shoutout to Calvin for assisting us with our concerns! :)

content.body: We've been using EasyShip for a couple of months. Worldwide shipping is complicated, and they made it easy for us. Application is great for handling daily sales and fulfilling batch orders (i.e., Kickstarter campaigns). It has multiple functionalities we can't live without. To name a few:* Seamless, one-click integration with Shopify (you can add many stores)* Shipping at Checkout (your customer can choose a courier, and the shipping cost is accurate). It works worldwide!* Insurance* Shipping rules (a great tool to automate shipping scenarios for different locations or box sizes)* Product listing * Simple import from file (excellent for batch orders - you can import any CSV file, and EasyShip support many e-commerce platforms * Customizable notification emails to customers In addition, EasyShip provides excellent customer and technical support (helps with couriers, customers, and the application). We highly recommend this application and other EasyShip services.

classification.summary: A satisfied EasyShip customer is praising the platform's shipping automation, Shopify integration, and customer support capabilities.

content.body: We've had an amazing experience with EasyShip! Our Account Manager is super responsive, and the platform is easy to use for both Ops, Warehouse, and Customer Support team members. Reporting has improved so much since January when we onboarded. Would highly recommend.

content.body: I've used several shipping softwares and none of them have had as many features and customization as ShipHero. content.body: We have been using Easyship for over 6 months and it is by far the best shipping app we have ever used! And trust me, we have worked with over 7 major shipping services now to try and find the right fit for our business! There are many reasons we have finally found our home with Easyship, but first and foremost the user interface is beautiful and functional, and the customer service is amazing! We love the integrated shopping cart with customized carrier options for every customer, the ability to offer shipping insurance, and the focus on international carrier options. In the backend, we love that we can ship in bulk, while easily changing weight or label options for an individual order without leaving the page. It is also incredibly easy to create custom shipping rules, and the filtering options are almost unlimited! Hands down, this is the best shipping app we have ever used! :)

content.body: Easyship has some of the best customer service I have experienced. To illustrate, we once had the problem that we had to manually add the shipping details for our shipments from Easyship into the shopify order. It truly seems that Easyship want your business to succeed. They have also helped us in establishing a new warehouse, and resolved problems with our couriers. content.body: We have been using Easyship for several years and the experience has been very good. Love how seamlessly it syncs up with Shopify, customers can see the many shipping options at checkout, delivery lead time, estimated taxes/customs incurred - everything is presented succinctly. The app continues to work on bringing added features and it is also worth to mention the tremendous customisable options on the app. Customer service has been quite prompt, more importantly our Customer Success Manager, Calvin, has been stellar and goes above and beyond to provide support and care. His genuine care for his clients definitely gives us greater confidence in the app and its services moving forward. Highly recommended!

content.body: This was the first 3PL we have partnered with. We initially chose to work with ShipMonk because of their experience and infrastructure with Shopify and their ability to deal with mass quantities of orders. Their onboarding process was simple and a straightforward plug-in through the app store. The App interface is very well made and has some great resources for training purposes. We worked with Kerry who has gone above and beyond in communication and transparency. Their whole team of Happiness Engineers is a major highlight of our experience. On the ground their operations exceeded our expectations. We had 5 figures in order quantity, and they maintained an error margin of around .01%. All orders were fulfilled within 2-5 days keeping our customers extremely happy. Some minor things that we would like to see improved on:Accurate up-to-date inventory counts after fulfilled orders.A more straightforward "assisted" claim process for orders with errors. Even more visibility into the receiving process.Quicker updates to billing cycle and pricing changes. Overall, we would recommend to any company who is looking for custom fulfillment specialists. Just be clear to set expectations early, and ShipMonk will deliver.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer shares a 5-star review highlighting excellent fulfillment performance and team communication, while noting minor areas for improvement in inventory tracking, claims processing, and operational visibility.

content.body: Horrible experience... Stay far away! Initially, they (Erik van Bilderbeek, Jennifer Santanna & Kerry Neysmith) promised us they can do everything we asked. We sent 50% of our inventory to them. Only to find out after they received our products that their system doesn't allow them to do so. Before launching we placed test orders to ourselves to see if Shipmonk can fulfill correctly and each time they made unacceptable mistakes. We sell underwear and they literally had measured some of our underwear products with a 7 inch height. Actual height is about 0.3". Shipmonk also weighed our products incorrectly adding a 1 pound 8 ounces weight for an underwear. Actual weight is 0.2 lbs. These measurements and weights were mistakes after our complaints getting their manager, Kerry, involved and re-measuring everything. How can they be so off? How can they be so negligent!? After 3 months of consistent issues after issues we just couldn't continue with them. 3 months of time lost. Thousands of dollars lost with Shipmonk even though all the issues were clearly theirs. They do not own up to their own mistakes. We ended up having to pay for their negligence. Highly Not Recommended! Stay Far Away! Find Another Fulfillment Center!

classification.summary: WAMA Underwear is actively seeking a new fulfillment partner after suffering 3 months of severe operational failures with ShipMonk including grossly inaccurate measurements, weights, and poor accountability that cost them thousands of dollars.

content.body: Shipbob has been a great partner since we joined them a year ago. They literally saved us from a disastrous situation with a different 3PL group (I won't name names, but "RH" should give you a hint). Their support is great and quick to respond. The rates are fair. I particularly enjoy the "all-in" pricing model. And their growing network of warehouse locations, especially internationally, is really helping us to seamlessly expand our overseas operations. I would give 4.5 stars if I could. My main criticism has to do with the Shopify integration, specifically the warehouse locations. Currently, the integration is set up where ShipBob acts as the fulfillment service and does not support multiple warehouse locations. So whether you have 1 Shipbob location, 4 Shipbob locations, or multiple locations between Shipbob and other providers (we sometimes ship from our headquarters, for example), Shopify groups it all into one and really limits what you can see and do in Shopify. I've been told this is being addressed, so really looking forward to seeing this improved.

content.body: Wouldn't Have Made over $3,000,000 Last Year Without Shipmonk! This software has expedited the SALES GROWTH of my business by removing the headache of shipping, storing, and hiring staff to package and process orders. With this weight off of my shoulders, I can 100% focus on new product development and effective marketing to continue increasing my business' revenue. The thing I LEAST LIKE about this software is that I didn't know it existed YEARS before! I have been using this software since the summer of 2018. Before that, I was STRUGGLING to keep up with packaging hundreds of monthly orders. Fast forwards years later, we now have THOUSANDS of orders each month. Image if I was still self-packaging my own orders with our current volume. This software is a MUST HAVE for serious business owners that want to build a business that can fully operate on its own. Overall, this software is CRITICAL because it frees my time, gives me location independence to travel, and enjoy my family without worrying about packaging material, processing orders, or interacting with shipping companies. This software gives me the security and confidence knowing that I am building a sustainable business that can and does run without me needing to be present for every aspect.

content.body: We use ShipBob for order fulfillment. They are a self service fulfillment operation, so as long as you feel comfortable navigating these waters with minimal support, I'd recommend them. However, after you reach a certain volume and $$ threshold, you get dedicated support. We've found the dedicated support very helpful. They just started offering 2-day delivery in the lower 48 states, so that was a big plus. We were considering using Deliverrr for the 2-day option, but they started offering this option before we made the switch. Sometimes standard shipping options are extremely delayed or never show up, (they use UPS mail innovations or DHL surepost for their standard options) but this might also happen elsewhere. International service offerings exist for Canada UK and EU. We also sell in Canada with ShipBob. As of now, they only offer Canada Post for standard and FedEx for expedited shipping. Very expensive options. The app itself works properly for us, although it would be nice to have ShipBob update inventory within Shopify. Perhaps we just haven't found this functionality yet.

content.body: After several years we are ending our relationship with Shipbob. They have overcharged us multiple times to the tune of thousands of dollars. Most recently, we submitted a work order to remove our few remaining items so we could close out our account. After paying for that work order, they "found" two cases of our most popular product of which we'd been sold out of for months. We relisted the item on our website and sold all but two units just in case there were any lost/damaged orders. We then submitted a disposal request for the warehouse to dispose of the two remaining 3.4 fl oz tubes of moisturizer so we could close our account. This should only cost a few dollars. Instead, Shipbob charged us $500 to dispose of two skincare products that fit in the palm of your hand. We raised the issue with Shipbob and weeks later we are still awaiting the refund...

classification.summary: A skincare brand is actively ending their relationship with ShipBob due to repeated overcharges and excessive disposal fees, seeking an alternative fulfillment partner.

content.body: I would highly recommend not using ShipMonk. I'm providing 2 stars because their UI is great, and the sync with Shopify is helpful so that we in theory don't have to update our inventory on a consistent basis (which in reality is not the case). If you have under 100 SKU's they may be a fit, we've been using them for a few years and everything was fine until we really starting scaling our inventory levels and SKU count. Then came receiving issues, lost inventory (and by default overselling to our customers and having to cancel orders), and sending the wrong product to our customers - as in not even inventory sold from our store (we sell dog merch, our customers have received human supplements, perfume, etc). I had to track down and reach out to the other stores separately to make sure they were aware their product (sometimes worth $100+) was being sent out to the wrong customers so they could also file claims. The lost inventory has been the biggest headache for us. When I say lost inventory I mean hundreds of units (some SKU's have a >6% shrink which ShipMonk claims is normal) that have gone missing within a few months, and no reimbursement with often what I would consider odd rational - they couldn't store everything in a single bin, therefore it's not their fault. Money drain! I will say different from other ShipMonk reviews I have mostly had good experiences with their CX team, and I think the bigger issue is that there are larger wide scale systemic issues with ShipMonk and the CX team is either not equipped to handle or they truly have no idea what happened and that's that. My negative experiences have been when agents will resolve a ticket when the issue is not fixed, so I've had to reopen tickets just to make sure they actually respond. Overall - I would keep shopping, not worth it.

classification.summary: A scaling ecommerce brand is frustrated with ShipMonk's inventory management issues, lost inventory, and wrong shipments, and is actively considering switching fulfillment providers.

content.body: Fantastic app. Is helping us break down the barriers when it comes to scaling an eCommerce business. Their Bulk shipping feature is a necessity for brands scaling around a hero product. Onboarding is incredibly easy and painless, our representative, Mike Azimi was a pleasure to work with and maybe one of the fastest communicators via email I've met.

classification.summary: Kong Beer Bong is a satisfied customer praising Saltbox's bulk shipping features and easy onboarding as they scale their eCommerce business.

content.body: A serious lifesaver for managing all my shipments! I love that I can give my international customers a dynamic checkout which includes various shipping options and the option to pay for taxes and duties right at checkout. This really helps eliminate any surprises our international customers may be hit with on delivery and improves conversions at checkout. I also love that it works so seamlessly with our shipping carriers and that we are able to easily import our discounted rates we negotiated with carriers. To add to this, their customer service is A++++! I worked with Hiromi and she was so wonderful throughout the whole process. Anytime I had a question, it was answered within 30 minutes. She also took the time to video conference with me and walk me through the whole platform and help me set it up! Thank you thank you thank you!

classification.summary: This is a positive review of a shipping/fulfillment platform praising international checkout features, carrier integration, and excellent customer service, not a prospect signal for Saltbox.

content.body: I used this app to integrate our Shopify store with our Shipbob account to automise orders fulfillment. It works perfect!

classification.summary: Villa Cotton is satisfied with their ShipBob integration for Shopify order fulfillment automation.

content.body: Don't even waste your time... I spent about 5 hours trying to get this app set up so I could offer calculated international shipping rates with duty quote during checkout. This included importing CSV file with all my product sizes and easyship classifications, adding all my shipping container sizes one-by-one and then paying over $800 for the annual subscription to Shopify as well as chatting with Shopify to manually turn on 3rd party calculated rates. After all that, I tried adding a couple items to the cart and checking out... it worked! But then, I tried adding a few more items and whenever I got over 10 items, the shipping calculation would say "Your cart has been updated and the items you added can't be shipped to your address. We don't offer shipping to United Kingdom" (or whatever country you might be testing) HUH?!? This is probably the worst wording imaginable. So I get a huge deal with a potential customer and they want to order 100 items and easyship tells them that we don't offer shipping to their country and I lose the customer for life?!? Who decided this was a good message? Sounds like a great way to lose business! I emailed easyship to see what is going on and didn't hear back... (In their defense, I did email on a Saturday morning, but I still hadn't heard anything at 4pm Monday). So, I opened live chat and spoke with someone who tells me that "this is a limitation of their software" and the only option is to use a Shopify flat rate shipping for larger orders. Who considers 10+ items too large of an order? So in other words, I just wasted about 5hrs of my life trying to use their app only to have it require me to go back to the way it was without the app. Again, don't waste your time with easyship... The name itself is false advertising :(

classification.summary: SimpliDock spent significant time and money implementing easyship's Shopify app for calculated international shipping, but the software fails on orders over 10 items and lacks responsive support, forcing them back to flat-rate shipping.

content.body: We've been using Shipbob for a year now and the service has been excellent, the automation flawless and the integration scaled with our needs. We're very pleased to work with Shipbob and they've kept up with us every step of the way as we've scaled our store, order volume and inventory variety.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their service quality, automation, and ability to scale with business growth.

content.body: The API works great, would like to have the weight of the shipment (actual vs dim), actual inventory. Also it would be nice if you when split a shipment that it updated both tracking numbers. Overall Shipbob is amazing, the above comments are all growing pains and I am guessing will be sorted out over time. Shipbob can handle the easiest to the most complex shipping issues!! Try them you will not be disappointed.

classification.summary: User is satisfied with ShipBob's overall service but requesting feature enhancements around shipment weight tracking, inventory visibility, and split shipment tracking updates.

content.body: Works great. Self-serve platforms are the standard for modern 3PLs and ShipBob is at the top. They've scaled seamlessly with our volumes, that have grown significantly over the last 3 years.

content.body: We've been working with Shipbob since 2018 and there are several reasons why Shipbob has been the perfect partner. First of all, speed to scale with us, pick-pack and ship with a business growing 1200% in a couple of weeks. Second of all, the locations across the US. We sells flammable goods that need to be shipped via ground, so Shipbob has been a great ally as they have 3pls all over the US facilitating 2-3 day delivery time for any customer in the US. Specially when weather challenges happen, being able to have different 3pls to ship from, allows you to ensure you seamless supply chain.Also their advanced software help us to quickly understand shipping costs and how to improve shipping times and costs by being closer to where your customer.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob customer praising their multi-location network, speed, and software capabilities for scaling a high-growth flammable goods business with fast delivery times.

content.body: ShipBob is the best for 3rd party direct to consumer fulfillment. I've used them since our business's inception last year and they've always been eager to help us succeed. Their app is intuitive and user friendly and they've got all the options you'll ever need. They're growing fast too! Soon to have multiple centers in Europe!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's fulfillment services and has no apparent need to switch providers.

content.body: This app is really very good in as much as they have chosen to scan and crosslink. Some missing information would be very helpful in feeding back from this API actual cost of shipping, the weight of the shipment (actual vs dim), actual inventory.

classification.summary: User appreciates the app's linking functionality but needs better data visibility including actual shipping costs, weight details, and real-time inventory information.

content.body: Switching warehouse management systems is a scary proposition. Especially when you have millions in the warehouse and are going right into the busiest season. After about 6 weeks we went from signing a contract to being live. And now after only 3 weeks on the platform we are already saving time and money.

classification.summary: SportStop.com successfully switched to a new warehouse management system and is already seeing time and cost savings after 3 weeks of operation.

content.body: LOVE ShipBob. We work on the ShipBob dashboard daily, and wouldn't change a thing. Everything from fulfillment to delivery is a breeze!

classification.summary: Bloom Nutrition is a satisfied ShipBob customer praising their fulfillment and delivery services with no apparent need to switch.

content.body: Great fulfillment and customer service! ShipBob is always improving the experience and looking for ways to help their clients.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's fulfillment service and customer service improvements, indicating satisfaction with their current provider.

content.body: We really enjoy working with the ShipBob dashboard on a daily basis. For our customer service team, it's a simple way to keep track of the stage of every package (from picking, to shipping, to delivery), and to provide these details to our customers when necessary. ShipBob has also made it super simple for us to be able to file claims with carriers when we've had issues with them, and we love their carriers estimated shipping time tool (especially during peak time season). Their dashboard is easy to understand and makes changes and edits to orders simple. We've also loved working with their team, both with our team lead as well as with every customer service rep we've spoken to on the phone. Through their dashboard and analytics, we've also been able to analyze our inventory and distribution of it to our different warehouses. Overall, would highly recommend.

classification.summary: This is a positive review from an existing ShipBob customer praising their dashboard, customer service, and analytics capabilities - not a prospect for Saltbox.

content.body: We have been using ShipBob for more than 1 year now and we are absolutely happy with their services. The dashboard is easy to use, everything automated so you can do other work while they are taking care of our order's fulfillment, and moreover, their support is just amazing! They are very responsive and resolve the problems as soon as you request.Their pricing is decent and it is so easy to use. I am not a tech person at all, and if I can use it, everyone can use it :) I highly recommend ShipBob!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's fulfillment services, dashboard usability, automation, responsive support, and pricing, with no indication of dissatisfaction or intent to switch.

content.body: We've used ShipBob ever since we launched 3 years ago and we couldn't be happier with our partnership. Their analytics dashboard is fascinating and user-friendly to pull data, track shipments, and track inventory. Our products have shipped to over 40 countries and ShipBob has had no issue. ShipBob is not just a 3PL, they are a true partner. They also do a good job of seeing areas of improvement for my company. They’ve introduced me to 4–5 companies that they think could be beneficial in specific areas, such as marketing or online reviews. You can’t really put a price on people I never would’ve met if it weren’t for having a good partnership with ShipBob. ShipBob does a good job of treating every brand they work with as a brand of their own. They’re like a large portfolio overseeing the development of different brands, and you can tell that they’re people you can trust. They’re not just throwing my products in poly mailers and sending them out; they’re a much more in-depth company.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their 3PL partnership, analytics capabilities, and strategic business support with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: We have used Shipbob for the past 4 months after migrating from a more antiquated fulfillment organization. We evaluated 5 fulfillment organizations prior to choosing Shipbob. There are 3 major reasons we chose Shipbob. First, Shipbob gave us the ability to analyze how to distribute our product across multiple warehouses in different parts of the US. Currently, we use 2 locations and are debating with Shipbob about moving our products into a 3rd location. The primary advantage of multiple locations has been reduced shipping cost, however with the winter storms and COVID we have also been able to fulfill out of an alternative location when one of the locations has been offline. This process has been automated and seamless which has saved us from a major customer satisfaction issue. The second reason we chose Shipbob is that they are truly partnering with us. They have made recommendations (location, box size, etc..) to help us reduce costs. Their pricing transparency and reporting is excellent and has helped us close our monthly reporting days earlier than with our prior fulfillment vendor. Lastly, we chose Shipbob because of its ease of integration and Dashboard. Everything from setting it up to running your shipping, changing addresses, chasing down customer sat issues etc... is available to us in an easy to use, intuitive, user friendly dashboard. Ultimately, we are very pleased with our decision to partner with Shipbob.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is actively scaling with multiple warehouse locations and appreciates their partner's cost optimization, reporting transparency, and user-friendly dashboard.

content.body: Using ShipBob for almost two years now. Seamless Shopify integration. Orders go directly to the ShipBob dashboard and are marked 'fulfilled' in Shopify once they're ready. We will keep working with ShipBob. They keep improving to continuously get even better. Really recommend using ShipBob.

classification.summary: Jimmy Joy USA is a satisfied ShipBob customer praising their Shopify integration and service quality with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: This is super easy and the customer service has been fantastic. We've been a long time customer of Shipbob and despite growing very fast they've kept up extremely well and have been great to work with.

classification.summary: Satisfied long-time ShipBob customer praising their easy service and responsive customer support despite rapid growth.

content.body: ShipBob is the 3rd fulfillment partner that we've migrated to in 4 years of growing our operations. Compared to what we've used in the past (plus about half a dozen options we only reviewed, but never used), they're really putting the users first. They're not just a logistics/freight company offering ecom fulfillment - they really give us the tools and options we need for our business. Whether it's inventory insights, custom packaging and marketing inserts, analytics and exports, or helping us optimize our pricing by figuring out which of their warehouses to use, it's really, really nice to have a fulfillment partner like ShipBob on our side.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer shares a positive review highlighting their fulfillment partner's superior tools, analytics, and customer-first approach compared to previous providers.

content.body: The integration works smoothly & whenever we've needed customer service, Shipbob has been speedy in responding.

classification.summary: Satisfied ShipBob customer praising their integration and responsive customer service.

content.body: As far as 3pls go, Shipbob is the best I've worked with! In my personal opinion, more than cheap shipping rates and automatic fulfillment, having insight into exactly what's happening at the warehouse level is my top priority. Shipbob makes this possible with their software-- absolutely unparalleled. It provides full transparency into each stage of the pick & pack process and when there are issues (impossible to avoid in logistics), our Merchant Success Manager is just an email, phone call, or text away as well as support which is pretty responsive to my requests. I'm physically 10 timezones removed from where we ship from so that's super helpful. Shipbob's claim/reimbursement policy for lost or damages parcels is super fair, whereas other 3PLs I've worked with can leave you with huge bills, missing stock, and no way to find out why or where your products are. I love shipbob!

classification.summary: Customer is highly satisfied with ShipBob's warehouse transparency, software capabilities, and responsive support, highlighting these as key differentiators from other 3PLs.

content.body: ShipBob's app integrates very well with Shopify and allows our order flow to automatically (*there is a slight sync delay*) appear in ShipBob's order management software. From there, the orders are picked, packed and shipped. This automated integration is key to any small business that needs their 3PL to do the heavy lifting! ShipBob is a massive player in the 3PL space and you should definitely give them a look to see if they can satisfy your needs and the needs of your customer.

content.body: Thanks to this app, I was able to go global, and I succeeded!! I now sell my product internationally. Every day customers are buying from all over the world. The parcels go every day very far from my place without any problem and with total ease. Merely the best shipping service I have ever had.
