content.body: Late December I contact 3 warehouse manager software Ship Hero, SKU Vault, and Finale Inventory. I spent 15 hours meeting with the 3 companies and meeting with 2 3PL one worked with Ship Hero the other with Sku Vault. By far Ship Hero is the best option for Shopify merchants. It's almost like it was build for it. We had to leave the 3PL that we were using within weeks and setup a 4000sq. warehouse. Reasons for leaving:1. 3PL had 1.5%-3% order error in peak months. 2. picker and packer were not efficient.3. Inventory was never correct.4. Shipping Amazon orders took too long5. No API integration with Shopify Plus. The solution: Ship Hero1. Error margin 0.01%2. picker and packer positions cut in half3. inventory is accurate 99%4. Integration with Amazon5. Ship Hero and Shopify Plus connect in minutes. If it wasn't for Ship Hero and Yosef Haas we wouldn't have been able to setup a warehouse in weeks. They advised us in all purchases from Racks to Scanners.During the learning phase (3 weeks) we meet with Ship Hero almost everyday. Onboarding team is extremely knowledgable and responsive. They don't let you struggle through setup mode which is already hard as it is. I couldn't be any happier or more satisfied with their software. Thanks Yosef PS. If Ship Hero didn't exist I would never want to own a warehouse.

classification.summary: A satisfied Shopify merchant describes their successful transition from a problematic 3PL to Ship Hero's WMS software, which resolved order accuracy, efficiency, and integration issues while enabling rapid warehouse setup.

content.body: As a brand that has been used to using Amazon FBA, the thought of handling international shipping from our Shopify store was admittedly daunting. Easyship has made the transition straight forward. We have connected with their partnered 3PLs in Hong Kong and the US who have also been great to work with. Being able to sync orders from Shopify to our 3PLs via Easyship has saved a lot of time. Especially since we don't have to prepare any shipping documents. The onboarding process and customer support has also been great so far.

classification.summary: Tawbury is satisfied with Easyship's 3PL and international shipping solution, having successfully transitioned from Amazon FBA with streamlined order syncing and minimal documentation requirements.

content.body: If I could give more, they'll get more...to make up for these 1-star toxic reviews. Be reasonable people. The setup can take some time as with many TP services/plugins, but the team at Easyship are extremely friendly and will go out of their way to help you if you're nice and easy to deal with too. I'd recommend setting up a demo phone call, keep a good relationship (as you should with business), and you'll have a seamless experience. They offer some serious analytical tools for an extra, But the basic free package is good enough. Good courier pricing as well. Personally, I've dealt with much third-party software, and the two account managers, Michelle and Shivanjali were top-notch. 10 out of 10. Definitely ask for their help if you're based in the States or APAC. Cheers guys, keep up the good work. Look forward to any new features. -Cal

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer is defending the service against negative reviews and praising their account managers and customer support experience.

content.body: Easyship is really amazing. It makes shipping super convenient. All I have to do is sync the orders and click on a button and make the payment. The courier comes by to collect it and will then deliver to my customers. It's that bloody easy. Definitely a great app to have for any e-commerce store!

content.body: Fantastic App! Some serious work ethics here compared to other apps I used before, i would really recommend this service.

classification.summary: User is satisfied with the service and recommending it based on superior work ethic compared to competitors.

content.body: DO NOT BOTHER with this waste of time shipping middle man. Over 75% of all shipments made through them have had problems. Now I know that they are just a middle man acting as agents for courier companies... but therein lies the problem. when you have a problem with your shipment, and I GUARANTEE you will, the only way to contact them is to open a support ticket which takes two days to receive a reply which is usually incomplete or inaccurate. the latest incident was a package picked up on 12/15/20 with a 2 - 5 day delivery service... 21 days later this is still not delivered and all I get from the email reply to my service request is "this in normal...we will look into it".... after three previous replies asking for confirmation that I want assistance. meanwhile my customers are leaving negative reviews because of their service.Bottom line.... do not install this app or use this joke of a freight middle man. Yes their rates are good... but dissatisfied customers leaving negative reviews about your company do not make up for the pennies saved.

classification.summary: Customer is actively warning others against using Saltbox due to severe shipping delays, poor customer support response times, and negative impact on their business reputation.

content.body: My team and I had a seamless transition to Shiphero. I have been able to speed up all my processes to better scale my stores in our new warehouse. Friendly support team really cares about your success. Only complain is that I didn't use it sooner!

content.body: Wasted my time - don't waste yours. Sounded like it had everything I needed - dimensional weight calculations, shipping rules, carrier rates displayed to customers, but virtually none of these things worked. Support was of no help, I have multiple tickets still open with them and it has been a month now with no answers. Wish it would of worked, but after multiple emails, (repeated) screenshots showing issues, there has been no resolutions. I can easily imagine what would happen if I ran into an issue down the road with them and needed help - it would be nothing.

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking to switch away from their current shipping/fulfillment solution due to non-functional features and unresponsive support over an extended period.

content.body: This is an excellent app offering seamless labelling etc. and competitive pricing with top courier firms, if you choose carefully (i.e. not Hermes). I use UPS who are generally considered a quality firm. They have misdirected a few parcels and the largest order I have sent I chose to insure, which I usually don't bother with. Well the insurance claim after UPS delivered it to the wrong address and it disappeared has been a complete farce. Fortunately I have only one insurance claim on the go as I wouldn't have the time or headspace to chase up several....It has been over two months of back and forth emails.As I said I put the odd cock up from UPS down to what I am not losing through instore pilferage. It would really help if the couriers photographed the door (with GPS coordinates) they are delivering to, instead of grabbing a 'signature' which doesn't really help much.

classification.summary: User is frustrated with courier delivery failures and insurance claim handling delays, though they acknowledge the app itself works well.

content.body: This app are a bunch of professionals know what they are doing. This app are a bunch of professionals know what they are doing

content.body: The support staff is very responsive. I had several concerns when starting to use the app and they were addressed right away.

content.body: I would NEVER recommend this fulfillment company to anyone... especially a startup that is trying to build their reputation. Shipmonk has been the biggest headache for me. I am the founder of my company and have direct interaction with the Shipmonk team and software on a daily basis. They have lost my product (numerous times) and blame me for it every time. Never apologizing even once it is found. They literally LOSE my product and I have to pay for their team to look for it. They charge extreme amounts for a service that is hardly fulfilled. "Over promise, Under deliver" is how I would rate Shipmonk. They do a great job at selling you on their services and once you move all your inventory and really invest in them, they start treating you like you're worth nothing to them. I currently have orders backed up for 7 days when their expected shipping timeframe is 3 days or less. No apologies just excuses. "It's a busy time of year." they say. I never take the time to write reviews but I felt this was absolutely necessary. I hope you consider ALL OTHER options before partnering with Shipmonk. Please feel free to call me directly if you'd like a more personal review of this company. 954-707-0665

classification.summary: Founder is actively seeking to switch from ShipMonk due to repeated inventory losses, poor customer service, delayed shipments, and overcharging for underdelivered services.

content.body: I would summarise the issues with this shipment provider, all based on our work with them for almost 10 months. 1) You will never see transparent pricing, they display only shipment and handling fees to you, the rest is being charged on the background. So your actual bill is never known, until u dig into this.2) Loosing packages all the time, in our case is $300 worth of parcel. When they do this here is the scenario:- If insured, claim will be reviewed for months, till now we still wasn't reimbursed for any;- If not insured, NEVER takes responsibility, saying "not our fault, but logistics provider, so we won't do anything". While this is them who is service provider for us, legally we ask them, they ask logistics company, bc if we message to lets say DHL, their response will be "u r not our client". The normal practice is when your shipment is not insured, at least shipping cost is supposed to be refunded as service you paid for wasn't delivered, but not with these guys;3) If they made a mistake on inventory side, they will ask you for $40/hour so some person in warehouse could fix it. So you should pay for mistakes they make;4) Customer support, unresponsive and incompetent. If certain cases are addressed in time, they still can be resolved, but not with these guys. What shipmonk support does is basically trying just to reply anything or blaming anyone else instead of addressing the issue, probably for their internal records. Connecting to the shipmonk will bring you only headache. I was really surprised how such a low quality service can be provided by a US company.

classification.summary: Long-term customer is actively seeking to switch from their current 3PL provider due to hidden pricing, lost packages with no accountability, surprise warehouse fees, and unresponsive customer support.

content.body: Great app and very useful. Fast communication and very helpful agent which will help you with all your questions.

classification.summary: Customer praising Saltbox's app quality, communication speed, and helpful support agents.

content.body: Shiphero has been one of the best decisions for our logistics. We have been able to handle more order volume efficiently and more precisely. It has even allowed us to expand our warehouse operations. The platform is easy to understand and use. Support has also been amazing and has sponsored special requirements for our business model.

classification.summary: Current customer praising ShipHero's ability to handle increased order volume and support their warehouse expansion.

content.body: Our experience with Shiphero has been awesome! PROS- Incredibly efficient pick/pack/ship. We have almost doubled our efficiency in the warehouse.- Accurately pushes inventory levels to many sales channels- Customer support is responsive and actually cares- Easy to use kitting/bundling- Automated shipping rate shopping CONS- Steeper learning curve than some software- Initial setup takes time to do correctly - Minimal reporting analytics

classification.summary: Customer is highly satisfied with Shiphero's warehouse efficiency and inventory management capabilities, sharing their positive experience rather than seeking alternatives.

content.body: Shipmonk is a true fulfillment partner. We have the assurance that the most important part of our business (deliveries) is going smoothly. It's plug and play once you're in their system! We focus on sales, and our partner Shipmonk takes care of the rest!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's fulfillment services and plug-and-play integration, expressing satisfaction with their current 3PL partner.

content.body: I am speaking to all of my fellow Shopify store owners in order to confirm that the hype is real. ShipHero came highly recommended and they have absolutely lived up to their 5-star reputation. ShipHero makes managing the most important aspects of your business efficient and easy while also providing an unbeatable platform to process your daily orders. ShipHero is constantly releasing new and useful features and because it is a cloud-based software, I instantly have access to these new features with no additional fees. If you sell through multiple vendors there is no doubt in my mind that this is the inventory management software for you. Like clockwork throughout the day, ShipHero quickly imports all of our orders from all of our vendors across the web. Most importantly, their customer support is extremely attentive and helpful.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipHero user is praising the platform's inventory management, multi-vendor order importing, and customer support in a Shopify review.

content.body: Where do I begin? It improved my efficiency a lot and I really like it. The team is very helpful....

classification.summary: Satisfied existing customer praising Saltbox's efficiency improvements and helpful team support.

content.body: We have been using their international shipment for 3 months. Overall, the experience is positive. Our initial shipments were for our Indiegogo campaign. They worked with us to use batch shipment to save cost. After that, we are using their regular service for our daily orders. Their UI interface gives you a clear view of shipping cost and duty tax for each available shipping option. Although there are some glitches with the app, they will work with you to fix them quickly. They don't own warehouse, so, all the pick and pack work you will work directly with the 3rd party warehouse that they recommend. Although initially, we were worried about communication issues between 3 parties, it turns out to be a none-issue. We are very happy with the warehouse they recommended. Suggestion for improvement to them is the post-shipment support. You will be getting typical scripted answers many times. But that make you frustrated especially for orders that are stuck or missing. If Easyship wants to be differentiated from their competitors, establishing an effective communication channel with the couriers that they provide can be a game changer. Because that will allow them to provide more info to the clients when a shipment is running into issues during shipment. By the way, have a good relationship with your account manager is important. They have been very helpful in every occasion.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Easyship's international shipping and warehouse partnership but suggests improving post-shipment support and courier communication to differentiate from competitors.

content.body: Seamless integration with our website. Great rates especially for the US. Also received great support from David in Melbourne!!

classification.summary: Existing customer from Australia praising Saltbox's seamless integration, competitive rates, and support quality.

content.body: Great company. They do a great job providing logistic services and are not very expensive. Highly recommend.

classification.summary: Existing customer praising Saltbox's logistics services and competitive pricing in a positive review.

content.body: What fulfillment company locks you into a contract and charges you to get your goods back if you're not pleased with their service!? Horrible experience, the charged us almost 3x more than our current fulfillment provider. The system in which inventory is imported is confusing at best. My gut feeling is the measurements are off so they can charge more for storage. we were paying more than 2x what we pay now for storage. Over $5,000 worth of our shipmonk inventory ended up on ebay months after we bit the bullet and moved all inventory to another fulfillment. Yes Our Items Were STOLEN after They charged us thousands of dollars to pick up our inventory! WTF If you're reading this don't make the same mistake we did!

classification.summary: Customer warns others about their negative experience with ShipMonk, citing high costs, contract lock-in, inventory theft, and poor service quality that led them to switch providers.

content.body: By far the worse company ever!! Please do not do business with them unless you like losing money. They will never take responsibility, overcharge you and shift blame every chance they get. I've lost major account/sales cause i've done business based on their empty promises. content.body: I'm honestly amazed about how smooth and easy the experience of working with ShipMonk has been so far. They ship everything in a timely manner, most of the time only hours after the orders are placed. The logistics used are great, and orders are being delivered super fast. Their support team is great, from the first person I talked to when I was doing some quotes, to everyone in the onboarding team and happiness engineers. They are super helpful and polite! The onboarding experience is well made to ensure they only ship the right pending orders on Shopify (not all 3PL companies worry about that, and it's critical to avoid errors when switching from another company or another fulfillment model). Dashboard looks clean and very well built. Fulfillment is not an easy task, but they made it easy to understand and find what you are looking for very fast. The algorithm can help a lot with inventory forecasting. Honestly, I have only good things to say. I'm a customer for less than a month, but so far, they were perfect. I don't usually write long reviews, but they deserved this. Keep it up, and congrats on the high-quality job. You awesome people at ShipMonk really make a difference and a big positive impact on a business. Thank you so much!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer is praising their fulfillment services, speed, support quality, and dashboard functionality in a glowing review.

content.body: UPDATE - 29 SEPT 2020 - so it turns out that Easyship use totally the wrong HS product codes for international shipments. A shipping app that can't cope with HS Codes??!! Really??? So, even if you have the correct HS Codes for your products in Shopify, Easyship say "due to a technical limitation, the HS code will not always pull through correctly, meaning a discrepancy between the information on Shopify and what is converted to Easyship". This means all your Commercial Invoices will be wrong. Surely getting this right is a comedy basic of any shipping app claiming to be a shipping app??! It's greatly taken the shine off what was a good experience until now...we only found this out because of a parcel getting stopped by customs with a question about a product's HS Code...not ideal!Unfortunately it also turns out there's no way to update your product listings in Easyship to fix this either...so you are knowingly giving customs the wrong info. Not great. In fact pretty poor. 2ND SEPT 2020We just installed Easyship to help us manage the UPS shipping process for our UK based store. We're really glad we did!! UPS can't integrate easily (understatement!) so we were having to manually enter every shipment into the UPS website (arrgh). Easyship solved this problem for us relatively easily and now works like a dream. Not only does Easyship make our shipping workflow/paperwork much easier and faster but it also solves our dynamic pricing at checkout so customers automatically see our special UPS shipping rates alongside our Royal Mail rates...awesome! Our only feedback would be that setting it up required quite a lot of research and there were some really helpful (although slightly out of date) videos on the Easyship YouTube channel - and we defo couldn't have done it without these. They steered us in the right direction and we were able to fill in most set-up gaps. What would be really useful is a step-by-step set up video guide for a Shopify Store if someone can make one so that all the set up steps are in one place. We linked to our UPS account and rates really easily and the initial glitch we had with creating labels/UPS tracking was resolved quickly after an online chat with Easyship support - they were super helpful and took time to understand the issue and help us get it fixed and followed up. The system is easily customisable and user friendly. All in all a really good experience - highly recommend. P.S. If we had one request it would be to work on integration with Royal Mail Click & Drop in the UK.

classification.summary: A UK-based ecommerce store is frustrated with Easyship's inability to correctly handle HS codes for international shipments, which causes customs issues and inaccurate commercial invoices despite the app otherwise improving their UPS shipping workflow.

What happened next changed my perspective about the Easyship team.The customer service & tech teams were super reactive in investigating the issue, resolving it and at the time communicating promptly with me(including phone calls) as regards what was causing the issue in the first place and what they were doing to fix it.

content.body: I originally wrote this review under the wrong app.  Wanted to put it in the correct place. Overall we have been relatively disappointed with this product. It is extremely powerful but is missing basic functionality that can make it or break it for your company depending on your business model. We operate with a lot of backorders, when stock comes in and is processed in for receipt, we need our oldest orders (customers who have been patiently waiting) to get their items first. The ship hero system randomly decides where to allocate it with no ryme or reason. It generally will skip tons of older orders and allocate it to newer orders; it will randomly give a couple to a bigger order and skip the rest, it just doesnt make any sense how it works. In many cases it will remove allocation from someone that has been waiting and give their products to other people. The system just simply needs to work where it allocates stock to the oldest orders first, if the user chooses to move an order up to a higher priority then they can do that themselves. If it wasn't for this constant struggle we are having with this allocation fiasco we would give it five stars.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with ShipHero's stock allocation logic that doesn't prioritize oldest orders first, causing fulfillment delays for backorder-heavy business models.

content.body:
Heed these warnings... if you like to stay in business.
We have been using Shipmonk for over 2 years. Their customer service is ok and so is their application but they will kill your startup with their ridiculous minimums and storage fees. To make it worse they you cannot trust what shipping they quote you, they will come back and charge 2 to 3X the original price quoted on the order. The latest example being charging $55 when the quote was $26. If I re-do the same order I am still shown $26. Its essentially fraud.
Also their minimum fees is a ridiculous concept. This is what I got from their support "when storage exceeds $250.00 your minimum increases to the storage cost". They already charge a premium on storage and they you end up paying 2X that because invariably your storage fees will cross usd 250 (unless you are shipping really small items with limited number of SKUs) and then that would become your new minimum, essentially doubling your storage fees. While they claim this crucial clause was always there on their website (we don't remember reading it) their sales agent never bothered to mention it during the initial meeting we had and it is not in our contract.
Also it is nearly impossible to know what you are paying for when it comes to storage "their system" essentially decides and there is very little visibility as to why you are paying of X number of pallets or Y number of bins. Also you would be paying for a whole pallet (X2 because of the minimums) even if you have 1 unit left on it and to make it worse you don't know so you can't do anything about it.
It is very hard to change a warehouse once you are stuck with one so do your research before you make the mistake we did.
Find someone else unless you love throwing away money. Companies like Shipmonk should go out of business so companies that do care about their customers can do well.
Echo in the line from a different review because we had to deal with the exact issue, thousands of dollars worth of lost inventory after they signed for it:"Some examples: They lose inventory upon receiving, because they don't check what they sign for when product is delivered to them vs. what they actually receive and enter into the system. So when shipments show as delivered but the inventory is missing from the warehouse, their excuse is that they receive too many shipments to possibly try to check what was actually received. They have literally, on multiple occasions, lost thousands of dollars of inventory, and even when escalated to the CEO, refuse to accept ownership of this or do anything about it. And because they signed the delivery slip, you can no longer claim for a lost package from the shipper."
One more thing.. do not trust the review posted on capterra .com. Capterra is a paid service and they will only post reviews they like, this review never showed up there even though it was posted there over 3 months ago, didn't even get an acknowledgement.

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking to switch from ShipMonk due to hidden minimum fees that double storage costs, unpredictable shipping quotes charged at 2-3X the quoted price, and lack of transparency in storage billing.

content.body: I have been sourcing for a good complete package shipping partner for years that is easy to use and provide local and international courier services.Easyship provide a really good platform for my customers to use with ease, both locally and internationally. My customers can have options to choose which courier and cost of shipping they like to use. We the business owners can easily sync the orders with Easyship with a few clicks and the courier services is deal done in a few minutes. Most importantly, the service support I get from the local team is very good. Whenever I have an issue, they promptly solved it quickly so We can move on with our business.  Its been a good business partner.

Looks like I'd be out of business quickly using this app. So sick of apps advertising "the best pricing" when in fact the pricing is awful. Sellers are not idiots.

content.body: I checked out this app and found that it will be beneficial to my store when the time comes to need the features that it has to offer. I look forward to using Easyship when that time comes.

classification.summary: User is favorably reviewing an app they plan to use in the future when their business needs its features.

content.body: EASY SHIP has been a game changer. Our Rep, Hiromi has gone above and beyond to help us manage our international orders. To find the best shipping methods at the best rate. Morph Clothing is very grateful to this type of expertise and customer care. WE LOVE EASY SHIP!

classification.summary: Morph Clothing is praising their current 3PL provider EASY SHIP and their representative Hiromi for excellent service managing international orders and shipping optimization.

content.body:
If you love having angry and confused customers or if you love refunding and canceling orders, shipmonk is the perfect choice for you.
Shipmonk is only interested in getting your money.
They can take up to ten days to dispatch a parcel, there is zero accountability or apologies for staff. If you ask why a parcel hasn't shipped, they will mark it as shipped to get you off their back, but the item's tracking information won't work because the item hasn't been sent.

classification.summary: Customer is actively dissatisfied with ShipMonk's slow shipping, lack of accountability, and dishonest order tracking practices, indicating they are looking to switch providers.

content.body: ShipHero has literally changed our business as a full-service 3PL (GrowthJet.com). The software is incredibly intuitive to use, the iPad app for picking has reduced our labor workload significantly, and there's even a surprisingly large amount of data/analytics you can get out of it. I can't recommend ShipHero enough to anyone looking for fulfillment software. Matt and Danielle at ShipHero have been incredibly responsive and helpful with troubleshooting. Thanks again!!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipHero customer praising their 3PL fulfillment software and service, not indicating any need to switch providers.

content.body:
I've been using Easyship for a couple of years now and it's pretty fantastic. You simply sync your orders from Shopify and based on the delivery address and package specifications, you get an immediate list of couriers you can use. You can schedule a parcel collection and once you ship, the tracking details is sent to Shopify which then sends it to your customers. Very user friendly and beautiful shipping integration.
PS : The generated labels are also perfect.

classification.summary: User is praising their current Easyship shipping solution and its seamless Shopify integration, with no indication of looking to switch services.

content.body: Excellent app and good personal support. They will take care of you and help you ship your first parcel. Highly recommended!

classification.summary: Customer praising Saltbox's app quality and personal support, recommending the service to others.

content.body:
We've been using ShipHero for 2 weeks and the software has not disappointed. The software is robust so it's a bit intimidating at first. And if it wasn't for Danielle (our fantastic account Rep) I don't think we would be using ShipHero today. Danielle stuck with us and was super patient in answering every question we had, whenever she did not have the answer, she always followed up.
Our business needs are very peculiar and we were able to adapt the system to our process without issues. Now we are running a faster and more organized inventory management and fulfillment process.
Of course there are more features we would like to see (as with every software), in our case would love to see an Android App and the ability to translate the software to Spanish. However, that will hopefully be released in the future.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipHero customer in Costa Rica praising the software's robustness and customization capabilities while requesting Android app and Spanish language support features.

content.body: I love how Easyship is linked into everything to make it all so easy to use!  Everything is in one place and the dashboard is very user friendly.  When I sent a query regarding a pick up, the response from swift and useful.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Easyship's integrated platform, user-friendly dashboard, and responsive customer service.

content.body: Easyship was super quick and easy to setup. It allowed us access to many large freight companies without a minimum spend. Also their software syncs with Shopify so no retyping of customer details saving hours during dispatch. Our customers love it because they get accurate shipping estimates during checkout and it even tells them the estimated duty/taxes and speed of delivery, providing them choices based on their needs. 5 Star!

classification.summary: BOXXD™ is praising Easyship's ease of setup, freight company access, Shopify integration, and customer-facing shipping estimate features.

content.body: Worked well until it didn't. All of sudden FedEx and UPS are not available. UPS would randomly not be available at times either. You have to deposit money into your account, we're trying to figure out how to get our remaining balance back, will update the review as needed.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with unreliable carrier availability and unclear account balance refund process with their current fulfillment provider.

content.body: This app is great if you're doing international shipping and want to make sure you get the best rates and the quickest shipping method! Really a time saver, and it's free.

classification.summary: User is praising a shipping rate optimization app for international fulfillment, highlighting cost savings and speed benefits.

content.body:
After over a year of searching and researching to find a robust, 2.0, inventory software management tool with 3PL features I had a friend recommend Shiphero. After a brief intro call I was intrigued, after the full demo I was blown away. Now, 1 month into our full integration and the software does what it says and more.
There is a level of thoughtfulness and organization that has gone into building Shiphero for the modern e-commerce business. From the sell ahead feature to the automation of shipping methods to every single field and feature. Shiphero allows us to create the rules that will help us continue to run an efficient warehouse without hindering our Sales and Marketing efforts.
Like any robust software there are nuances and tricks one must learn, but with patience and time even these nuances were well thought out and exist for a reason.
I also wanted to acknowledge the amazing support staff. Our account rep Matt has gone above and beyond on multiple occasions to help us as we learn the system. The customer service is hands down the most impressive I have ever experienced.
I am very happy and I have already recommended Shiphero to several of my friends in e-commerce.
5 stars is well deserved.

classification.summary: This is a positive review of Shiphero (a competitor) highlighting satisfaction with their inventory management and 3PL features, not a prospect for Saltbox.

content.body: Amazing app, not the easiest to set up but if your tech-savvy and are willing to spend some time diving in this software is amazing. ONLY issue si have that really bugs me is the support is trash, emails only and takes 24 hours to get help when sometimes i need assistance on something immediately, figure you have customers paying 1k a month or more and they only have emails? Also the reps don't even read your questions properly but just answer what they assume your asking and this results in them answering something you didn't ask, thus more wasted support time for a solution.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with slow email-only support and poor response quality despite paying premium pricing, though they acknowledge the core software is good.

content.body:
SHITTY APP AND SHITTY PROVIDER! STAY AWAY FROM BY ALL MEANS!
I have used ShipMonk for a few months. From the first moment, I had a horrible experience. When something is horrible from the beginning, it is horrible throughout all of the time.
Communication is HORRIBLE. They kept making on-going MISTAKES all the time. They were giving me FALSE pricing. When I wanted to stop my relationship with ShipMonk, it was A PAIN IN THE ASS to leave them.
All in all, being an eCommerce entrepreneur for 15 years, ShipMonk has been absolutely by all means THE WORST SUPPLIER I have ever used.
S-T-A-Y A-W-A-Y FROM! THERE ARE TOO MANY BETTER OPTIONS OUT THERE!

classification.summary: UpSpirit is actively leaving ShipMonk due to poor communication, recurring mistakes, false pricing, and difficult offboarding, and is seeking alternative fulfillment providers.

content.body: ShipHero is great! It is our first WMS and a good fit for a growing e-commerce operation. We transitioned from a paper pick ticket process to barcodes and scanners and ShipHero pretty much does everything we need it to do. Onboarding was very helpful. Danielle stuck with us and answered all of our questions. Post-onboarding support has been great as well. They actually add features that we request! We needed a custom report through their API and their developers made it happen for us! Their ecosystem is a little jumbled between multiple apps and web-based platforms. It can be hard to know where to find certain settings and there are multiple exports/imports for different product details. Hopefully this will be streamlined in future updates.Consistent weekly upgrades and bug fixes are great. The software seems to be getting better all the time.

classification.summary: The Goulet Pen Company is satisfied with their WMS (ShipHero) but notes UI/UX complexity with multiple platforms and suggests streamlining settings and data exports.

content.body: The on-boarding process with ShipHero was made easy by Danielle. We are extremely fortunate to have had someone walk us through step by step, answering all of our questions during the on-boarding process. We are a quickly scaling business, so switching over to a new order fulfillment and inventory management system was bound to be a challenging task. Thankfully this process was made much easier with hands on help from Danielle and the rest of the ShipHero team. We are about a month into operating with ShipHero in place and it has been the best thing to happen to our operations process – without question. Thank you ShipHero and Danielle for always being so responsive and helpful!

classification.summary: Balance Athletica is a scaling ecommerce brand praising ShipHero's onboarding support and fulfillment system, expressing satisfaction with the transition to their new order management platform.

content.body: EasyShip has been a great switch for us, so we can expand our customer base worldwide! The support team has been very helpful throughout the process, which makes this entire experience a plus for us!

classification.summary: Peace Out Inc is satisfied with EasyShip's fulfillment services and support, enabling them to expand their customer base globally.

content.body:
Game Changer! We looked at over 10 WMS systems for months and went through tons of training, and nothing even came close to ShipHero. We wanted to make sure with a move like this is was worth it. After finally switching over to ShipHero we quickly realized we should have done it years early. It is even better than we expected.
It is extremely user-friendly. Everything about this system just makes sense. Hiring people and showing them how to start picking, packing, and shipping takes a matter of minutes instead of days. The visibility we get with this system is amazing. I can see who is the top picker, packer, who made changes. It really has made our company so much better all around.
The support is crazy good! A special shout out to Matt Dickman ( Senior Solutions Specialist) He made the switch over from our current system painless. Even took the time to text, email, and call after the set up was complete. He kept checking in on our side to make sure things were running the correct way for weeks.I could not be more impressed with ShipHero!

classification.summary: Beddy's is praising ShipHero as a superior WMS solution that improved operational efficiency, visibility, and team onboarding compared to 10+ other systems they evaluated.

content.body: I used this app for our shipping management and it works perfect.  The support is good and help us on everything we need.

classification.summary: MaxiTrucks is satisfied with their current shipping management app and support services.

content.body: Easyship has made it so much faster for us to ship our parcels, no more multiple steps, the app will automatically fulfil orders and add in tracking numbers. Love that there are different courier options as well, especially when we have to ship overseas! Overall loving the app!

classification.summary: Customer is praising Easyship's shipping automation and courier options, not expressing interest in switching services.

content.body: Takes out the guesswork for shipping, so that we dont overcharge or undercharge our customers, shortens our processing time.

classification.summary: Customer appreciates how Saltbox's shipping solution reduces guesswork, prevents overcharging/undercharging, and speeds up processing time.

content.body: An excellent tool for our up & coming e-commerce company. Makes for painless inventory management & order fulfillment. Not to mention how accessible & helpful our specialist Matt has been throughout the whole process. Thanks ShipHero!

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising their current fulfillment solution (ShipHero) for inventory management and order fulfillment with excellent customer service support.

content.body: Easyship helped to streamline my shipping needs and made international a whole lot easier. It's easy to use and support is great, I would recommend it for anyone new to Shopify and wants to simplify their shipping.However I wish it works/integrates better with the Oberlo app. I have some dropshipping items that don't work with the Easyship app. It would be great if it had more options for a mix of dropshipping and adding of adhoc couriers.

classification.summary: User is satisfied with Easyship for international shipping but frustrated by poor integration with Oberlo for dropshipping and wants more courier flexibility for mixed fulfillment models.

content.body: UPDATED REVIEW: HIDDEN FEES! BEWARE! The app has started charging shippers "residential fees" which are never disclosed beforehand. Easy ship obviously realized their mistake and started adding a "residential fee" option before checkout to make it easier, but then they discontinued this feature and I am being charged these hidden fees again! This is absolutely ridiculous.

classification.summary: Frustrated with undisclosed residential fees and discontinued fee transparency features from current shipping service provider.

content.body:
I agree with the feedback left by DreamCastle. It takes three months for the billing from FedEx to be updated to Easyship billing. I am charged when creating labels one amount based upon the actual weight and box dimensions when shipping to the customers. Three months later a bill arrives with numerous adjustments to the shipments and in most cases, and to no surprised, the actual and (true) weights and box dimensions increased the chargeable weight by FedEx. It's no wonder this is a free app and as for me, it doesn't work for our business.
Also, be aware you will be charged by FedEx for Residential Area Surcharge. This amount can be anywhere from $4.40 to just under $10.00. It's depends on how far the delivery is out of the way for the driver. This comes out of your pocket unless you pass this cost onto the customers. Then again, this increase most likely will have your customers shopping elsewhere online.
Be aware, Easyship will nickle and dime you to death. I'm done and will now use USPS and UPS offered by Shopify. It's cheaper.

classification.summary: Customer is abandoning Easyship due to unexpected FedEx billing adjustments and residential surcharges that make fulfillment uneconomical, and is switching to USPS and UPS through Shopify.

content.body:
Having used Shipstation, Stitchlabs and several others before ShipHero, I cannot recommend ShipHero more highly.
ShipHero is a complete system for running your ecommerce operation. It is powerful, the system is fast and it's reliable and accurate.
There are a ton of features in ShipHero that we did not expect to find, it's a pretty comprehensive solution.
If you're shipping more than 200 orders a day, you won't find better software to run your Shopify business than ShipHero.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipHero user sharing a positive review of their shipping software after previously using competitors like Shipstation and Stitchlabs.

content.body:
Exactly what I've been looking for to make international shipping a breeze! Customer support was excellent, and AJ from HK was always there to help me with any questions I had.
Highly recommended and my first choice for sending products worldwide.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising their current international shipping solution and customer support, not indicating any need to switch providers.

content.body: Great freight solutions app, for small businesses. Am a small business, in Australia and this easyship platform helps me save money sending parcels within australia and newzealand.Shipping rates are great with their partnered couriers. One thing to consider is that you need to pick and choose the courier you use, Some couriers are more reliable than the rest but the easyship platform is easy to use after some playing around. to start off, i would recommend showing a higher delivery time to trial the faster couriers to avoid disappointmentSupport is decently quick and they try to answer your questions as soon as possible. David Um from Melbourne is highly accountable and is very hospitable in terms of providing support.Only issue is that their "cutoff" time for some couriers for next day pick up happens earlier than midnight, meaning an order placed at 4pm wont be picked up the next day, but rather the day after. With the cheap shipping options, i can work around this.Been a great experience so far, been using this app for months and will continue to do so. 5/5

classification.summary: Australian small business satisfied with EasyShip's shipping rates and platform but notes cutoff time limitations for next-day pickup.

content.body:
What a useful app to help us find the best solutions for shipping our orders. We can sort by the lowest rate or the fastest, and the interface is pretty easy to use.
I just wish the site were better optimized for mobile!

classification.summary: User appreciates the shipping rate comparison app but is frustrated with poor mobile optimization.

content.body: Incredible experience working with Shipmonk. I have worked with a few 3PLs for my business and this has been the smoothest operation I have encountered. They receive product well, notify when in stock, the dashboard is very communicative and connects well with my store. Overall, I would recommend them to all of my fellow eComm businesses.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's 3PL services and recommending them to other ecommerce businesses based on their positive experience.

content.body: Awesome experience working with Shipmonk! The service is amazing! I was able to focus on sales and engagement rather than spending hours fulfilling orders!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's fulfillment service for allowing them to focus on sales and marketing rather than order fulfillment.

content.body: Sadly we had the worst 6 months ever using this app, The support gave terrible advice, we had to figure out most things on our own, had constant problems and had to manage a huge mess while deleting them from our software to integrate a new system. It was pretty stressful.

classification.summary: Customer had a severely negative 6-month experience with poor support and operational issues, leading them to switch to a new system.

content.body: Easyship makes things easier to ship locally and internationally. The rates for shipping are great. We highly recommend the Easyship app! Thanks David Um and Jack for their great support!

classification.summary: Customer is praising Easyship's shipping rates and customer support, indicating satisfaction with their current solution.

content.body: ShipHero solved a huge fulfillment problem we were having and has allowed us to efficiently track product lot codes by shipment. Matt was extremely helpful during onboarding and open to unorthodox solutions/ideas to solve the problem we encountered with other software. We previously tried 4-5 other cloud inventory management/fulfillment "solutions" that did not solve anything for us - including ShipStation and Trade Gecko. ShipHero is our inventory and shipping hero :)

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipHero's fulfillment solution and appreciates its ability to track product lot codes and accommodate custom requirements that other solutions failed to provide.

content.body: ShipMonk is excellent for sending packages to customers across the world. Their application allows you to directly route all shipments as they come in so you don't need to think about anything. It's a very simple and efficient fulfillment method that will save you time and money.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's fulfillment services for their efficiency, simplicity, and cost savings in international shipping.

content.body:
I am giving ShipMonk a 5-Star review for various reasons! "SIMPLICITY" would be one word to describe the overall user experience and business experience with ShipMonk. They have made a phenomenal job at Simplifying the entire process from Shopify integration to receiving your products in their warehouses and shipping them globally. They have a truly dedicated and devoted Customer Service team to help you every step of the way. Their international shipping rates are attractive and that has been much appreciated by our customers. Working with ShipMonk has been a plain-sailing journey. ShipMonk has made it possible for me to run my business remotely from anywhere in the world which I am truly appreciative and grateful for.
Cheers,Toulaish, CEO, Sleep-Bliss

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer praising their simplicity, customer service, and international shipping capabilities with no indication of switching providers.

content.body:
We've been using Ship Hero for about a year now and are thrilled.  The biggest thing when comparing it to other solutions is that it's intuitive and streamlined.  As a team of millennials we've found many of the other solutions out there were simply too clunky, time consuming and outdated.. we LOVE using ship hero and are excited to continue to grow with them.Their support has been some of the best we've experienced in our 3 year history -always pleasant, knowledgable and willing to dig into any issues that arise.  Although there have been a number of integration hiccups, as soon as they've been identified support is on it and doesn't stop until it's resolved. Extra credit needs to be given to Nicholas who somehow always finds the time to respond and make sure we're taken care of regardless of the situation.  It's very clear that they intend to continue growing by providing an awesome product and the proper support to go along with it.
Very scalable-  Prior to Ship Hero we were doing a lot of things manually and were always a little concerned about our ability to scale.  Ship Hero has completely changed our whole warehousing system and has given us the confidence to scale as quickly as we want.  We think it's a great solution for small, mid-size and large companies.  Once you make the switch and learn the platform you'll never want to go back.

classification.summary: American Tall is a satisfied Ship Hero customer praising the platform's intuitiveness, scalability, and support quality as they confidently scale their warehousing operations.

content.body: It  was easy to setup, great customer service! We used Shipmonk  Integration with Shopify has been seamless. I definitely recommend.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipMonk's easy setup, customer service, and Shopify integration and recommends the service.

content.body: We recently started using EasyShip and the transparency it provides to our customers. Our products also have a unique dimension and weight and EasyShip was able to give us better rates than what we were getting when working directly with the shipping carriers.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with EasyShip's transparency and competitive shipping rates for their unique product dimensions and weights.

content.body:
In early 2018 we replaced Stitch Labs, our previous Inventory Management Software, with ShipHero.  Prior to ShipHero, our Customer Service team was spending hours printing orders.  We had a team of Order Checkers doing nothing but checking orders that had been pulled by our 1st team of order pullers to ensure the integrity of the order. We also were having to use a second software platform, ShipStation, to handle the actual shipping process.
With ShipHero, we were able to eliminate all of this.  Thanks to paperless order picking via barcode scanning, we no longer print and staple orders for hours every day.  Since every product gets scanned before it gets added to a bin, we were also able to transition our entire team of order checkers to other positions which immediately made us more productive.  And as for the shipping process, we were able to eliminate a second software charge because ShipHero handles the process from start to finish.
Now, only because it’s my second nature to always be looking for something better, in March of 2019 I began participating in demo’s of other inventory management systems.  We looked in depth at Veeqo, Tradegecko, BrightPearl, SKUvault, OrderHive, Zoho and Clear Spider.  All of these systems had their strengths and weaknesses but due to BIG promises of a more streamlined workflow and better reporting, we left ShipHero and went with SKUvault.  Needless to say, after 2 months of ‘Training and Implementation’ and 3 weeks Live operating the software, it was not what we had hoped for.  We were spending 2x longer preparing orders because each order had to be assigned to a session.  We were spending 2x longer pulling orders due to the additional steps involved.  Our ‘Just in Time’ dept was spending 3x longer preparing orders because the workflow was too complicated and time consuming.  Granted, SKUvault attempted to help us work through all of this but, in the end, the functionality was inefficient.
The reality of all of this is that none of these systems came close to matching the functionality and efficiency of ShipHero.  ShipHero welcomed us back with open arms and got us up in running again in just a couple of days.  Yosef and the entire team at ShipHero came together to make it happen.  We now have our wholesale and retail sites connected back to ShipHero and plan to add our brick and mortar next.
The nightmare is over (as every team manager in my office/warehouse has told me).
Thank you ShipHero!

classification.summary: Company shares their positive experience with ShipHero's efficiency improvements and explains why their subsequent switch to SKUvault was a costly mistake due to inefficient workflows.

content.body:
30K+ orders per month. We recently changed to ShipHero from another well known shipping software, and it has really done well at minimizing order errors. We ship a little slower since we elect to scan the items on pick, then re-scan when we pack, but that process can be modified. The labels (when doing single item batches) aren't the fastest, but we have the system set to rate-shop every package. We were introduced to an update that's coming and it really sped up this process.
As for support, we have nothing bad to say. They are quick to respond and have worked hard to fix any issues we have seen. There was no down time with orders while we changed software providers. This was my main concern when I saw that there wasn't a direct customer service line, so I set up a meeting to discuss this ahead of time. They explained that customer service issues that are causing a delay in orders going out is always a priority and will be handled quick, while issues that are like-to-haves or lower priority items are handled a little slower (which is understandable). Someone from their implementation team traveled in to help us launch successfully and we are thankful they did. We had a ton of issues and it wasn't ShipHero.. it was how the old software communicated fulfillment statuses to the orders in Shopify.
All-in-all, the software is great. There are a lot of features we would like to see, some of them are already in the works. In our opinion, this system is the best value for 3PL softwares. We were actually $25,000 deep in setup and another $30,000 in equipment, trying to make another 3PL software work for us.  Most we looked at were not as user friendly (you needed an advanced degree in coding software to set up), most needed additional software to function how we needed which costs more, and some didn't even have the ability to show an item image for our packers.

classification.summary: Satisfied 3PL customer praising their current ShipHero software solution after switching from another provider, highlighting cost savings and superior user-friendliness compared to competitors.

content.body: I found the app and the whole software really easy to use. Any questions I had were answered swiftly, making the whole integration seamless. Really pleased I switched.

classification.summary: Satisfied existing customer praising Saltbox's ease of use and responsive support after switching from a previous solution.

content.body: ShipHero makes the picking process so efficient and the platform is easy to use. Our team caught on very quickly & the app allows us to track where mistakes are being made so we can complete further training with that user. We love being able to track where the orders are in the shipping process. We found that ShipHero's support team was very responsive during onboarding, even helping us customize our invoice and an internal Ship to Store label. We definitely appreciate the level of support they've provided

classification.summary: Glik's is praising ShipHero's picking efficiency, user-friendly platform, order tracking, and responsive support team.

content.body: Okay system - Not the best because that it has to many small errors. The support is crazy bad. Long delay on reply to my mails and sometime we don't get any feedback on our e-mails.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with system errors and severely poor support response times, experiencing long delays and no replies to emails.

content.body: Shipmonk is terrible at what a 3PL should be great at: communication with its customers, shipping time, shipping accuracy, and warehousing. They've shipped another company's products to our customers, multiple times.

classification.summary: Hugh & Crye is actively dissatisfied with ShipMonk's poor communication, slow shipping, inaccurate fulfillment, and critical warehousing errors (wrong products shipped) and is likely seeking an alternative 3PL provider.

content.body: Although we chose to not integrated ShipHero for the particular store we were trying it on, because it was more advanced and feature-rich than we needed at this time, the platform and it's abilities are outstanding.  Even more so, the team and support at ShipHero - especially Matt - was worth the 5-star review itself.  Their scheduling and onboarding process was very thorough and detailed.  The support we received was very good especially for the asking price.  I am sure as this store scales ShipHero will likely be integrated at some point, but for now, it's a bit overkill for us.

classification.summary: Envoyer Fine Wines evaluated ShipHero but decided against integration due to it being more advanced than their current needs, though they praised the platform and support and expect to use it in the future as they scale.

content.body:
Four and a half years later, and we are still committed to our relationship with Fulfillrite. Over the years, I continue to be impressed by how easy they are to work with, how smart they are, and how responsive they are. The app has improved over the years, and it seems like every time I think, “It would be nice if the app did this,” within a short period of time, even without me requesting it, the app ends up doing the thing I wish it did. It’s often updated before I even realized I needed that update in my life. While the app design is very simple, it is so robust and provides me with reports I want, the ability to check shipping prices easily, and they are now working on a beta to link their shipping prices to Shopify… genius! Joe is super kind, helpful, and responsive. I couldn’t ask for a better partner!
**********************Original review from November 2014:Fulfillrite does an amazing job at everything. During our initial contact, we had great service as they helped us understand how the app would work, and also how we can use it for our Kickstarter campaigns. We had many calls and emails back and forth, and I was so impressed that they had thought of EVERY detail. There was no question I could throw at them that they didn't have a solid response to. This was impressive, and I was getting hooked. Then we took the leap and started to use them. The app is amazing as it does all the work for you. Orders from Shopify show up quickly over in my Fulfillrite account. And Fulfillrite's website is just amazing. I can import orders, add orders manually, or the orders are automatically there from Shopify. And then the Shopify orders get marked as fulfilled, and emails are sent out immediately to my customers. And I can track progress on every order, and the data is practically real time. The team ships out my orders so quickly, I'm certain that my customers are impressed and pleased. I certainly am, and I'm so glad we found them.

classification.summary: A long-term, highly satisfied customer of Fulfillrite praising their responsiveness, app quality, and partnership over 4.5 years.

content.body: Before using Easyship we used three different app's for our domestic and foreign shipments. Now with Easyship it has streamlined our shipments into one app that has all shipped information on one page. I would recommend for any eCommerce vendor to control their shipments.

classification.summary: Customer is praising Easyship for consolidating multiple shipping apps into one unified platform that improves shipment control and visibility.

content.body: Easyship has allowed us to take control of our shipping with an easy to use interface.  We can now offer shipping options to our customers based on cost and time and overall our delivery times have improved significantly. Customer service is also amazing. Tracking details are very detailed and easy to access and resend to customers when they experience issues with a courier or a delivery. Thank you Easyship!

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Easyship's shipping control, delivery speed improvements, and customer service capabilities.

content.body: App works well, only problem is inventory isnt always updated.  They definitely need to fix that because you have to call them to figure it out

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with Saltbox's inventory management system requiring manual phone calls to resolve discrepancies, indicating a need for better real-time inventory synchronization.

content.body: I've talked to many 3PL's across the country and ShipMonk is one of the best i've seen! Their technology platform is top-notch; I especially love the fact that there is an embedded shipping calculator, so you can play with so many scenarios and get pricing. Oh, and their shipping rates are heavily discounted which opens the door for global sales. Highly recommend ShipMonk for all of your storage and fulfillment needs.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's technology platform, discounted shipping rates, and fulfillment services as a strong 3PL option.

content.body:
Be warned: EasyShip looks nice and shiny but start digging under the hood and there are some things you need to be wary of.Pro's:Great for cash flow (pay as you go),Nice additions such as tracking page with banners,Integration with PayPal,Reasonably good supportCon's:The Hong Kong warehouse partner they paired me with has been an unmitigated disaster. Lost orders, lost stock and ineffective coms,A number of selling features just weren't available and the support couldn't get them to work (No way to turn off taxes and charges for irrelevant countries, discounted shipping),Would not allow me to have a business address outside of Hong Kong in order to ship from HK (which is so freakin bizarre it's astonishing)The inability to sync products with Shopify (seriously you need to import a CSV file!), SKU's weights etc is similarly an insane omission. It betrays the lack of inventory management knowledge within the core team at EasyShip. This and the following omission places your fulfilment service at severe risk - you are warned,Barcodes of products are not featured or considered. Someone thought this was unimportant. It is.
Pro's aside I have decided to stock out of the disastrous warehouse I was paired with, cut my losses and finish with EasyShip. EasyShip was pretty bummed for me so I can't blame them beyond a lack of due diligence in bringing this warehouse on-board. If you plan to ship from home or your own business perhaps consider it. Otherwise tread carefully...

classification.summary: User is actively leaving EasyShip due to severe warehouse partner failures including lost orders, poor inventory management, lack of product syncing capabilities, and missing barcode/SKU features.

content.body: I reached out to shiphero to request a new field in the Automation Rules, to allow us to have a start and stop time and date for offering our customers a free gift with purchase. content.body: The app integration was fast and easy. We hired Shipmonk to fulfill orders for our startup business on Shopify. We were assigned a designated Happiness Engineer (HE) who walked us through an onboarding session to get our team familiarized with the system. Our fulfillment and shipping required custom packing specifications depending on the platform/store orders were processed from and the team was able to work with us on this. When our HE was not available, it was easy to reach out to Shipmonk for assistance by submitting a ticket online in which we would receive a response within 24 hours. The only drawback that we experience is the communication between pacific and eastern time. Although our company is based in California, we preferred the Florida warehouse to complete our order fulfillment. Overall, we are satisfied with Shipmonk’s services and team of professionals.

content.body:
Excellent service!
The onboarding process was entirely done by them within 24 hours and everything was easily set up.
Integrates very well with shopify and automatically manages and fulfills orders and inventory.
Good shipping rates and fast delivery times.
Impeccable customer service, responds and resolves issues as fast as they can.
Overall great experience!

classification.summary: Existing customer in Australia expressing satisfaction with Saltbox's onboarding, Shopify integration, shipping rates, and customer service.

content.body:
We've been using Shipmonk (and their associated Shopify app) for more than a year now.
The onboarding process is fairly easy and they help you connect your store to their fulfillment center, and map the SKUs to their internal inventory codes. You can also do it yourself manually if you create product bundles, for instance, or they will do it for you if you have a lot of them, just by sending them a CSV.
From that moment on, Shipmonk automatically captures the orders from Shopify, processes them, and then inserts the tracking number once the order has been fulfilled.
So all in all, it is a very straightforward process and the only work you need to do is check their interface daily to verify no orders are "stuck" because the buyer entered an incorret address, or you have run out of stock of any item (which you shouldn't, as they provide a forecast on how many days of inventory you have left at the current sales rate.
All in all, very satisfied with their service and the timely delivery of the orders to my customers.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer reviewing their positive experience with automated order fulfillment and inventory management, with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: Terrible. Absolute nightmare the last few months we were with them. Cost us thousands of dollars in documented direct losses due to numerous shipping mistakes and lost and/or misplaced inventory on orders for just one account alone.  We were assessed chargebacks, fees and losses due to inaccurate carton contents, shipments that were short units, shipments that were over units, late shipments and packages that were missing necessary documents.Numerous emails and calls to them communicating instructions and identifying concerns and issues but they still made repeated mistakes.  Repeatedly provided us with inaccurate info regarding shipments and status. Due to inaccurate inventory numbers, we repeatedly asked them to provide us with an inventory report but took them weeks to  provide.

content.body: As other reviewers mentioned, if you have a store with a lot of items, multiple warehouses and, in general, if you require a more complex solution than just pack and ship, ShipHero is a great option.That's not to say they are extremely easy to use or install. content.body:
Super app makes handling several online stores super easy. Picking and receiving a purchase order is super magical! This app is working very well. Customer service is great.
Need to make better ->
- Not easy to update product data (CSV) - you think that you can update all product data with one CSV download? No that's too easy! There is 3 different CSV needed to download. Update cost, Update inventory value, Update Manufacturer SKU all these are in different places?
- Not easy to make purchase orders (Automatic is not good) Cannot make vendor base limit? System offer to order if you have even one product under the order limit.
- Not easy to make a transfer order -> You really need to remember all product name or SKU? No automatic, no product picture ... it's maybe just easier to call the main warehouse and make the order in a phone. It's funny that you cannot use the purchase order automatic in transfer orders...
But these are a minor things the app is great and fix many problems in the warehouse. I think nowadays we have 0% mistake rate in picking thank Shiphero and of course our warehouse guys!

classification.summary: User is satisfied with overall warehouse operations but frustrated with product data management, purchase order automation, and transfer order processes that lack user-friendly features like automatic suggestions and visual aids.

content.body: We switched over to Shiphero from Shipstation in March of '17 and we couldn't be happier. We switched over initially because we needed our pickers to have the ability to scan products - we had lots of issues with shipping the right item wrong size previously. After the adjustment period when people are learning the software and forcing it to do things it is attempting to stop, everything runs smoothly. It integrates seamlessly with Shopify which has been fantastic, one thing we wished there was Quickbooks integration but we've found a decent piece of software called Softcookies to handle this. The Shiphero staff has been quite professional and expedient when answering questions or fixing any problems we've come across and have made the transition and continued use of Shiphero to be nothing short of wonderful!

The support staff is outstanding, they added some shipping options that we needed and we can now offer Fed Ex, UPS, DHL at competitive rates.It does take a little set the system up (you need to add dimensions of each of your products and sku numbers) but once you have done that you are set to ship.BEST PART! content.body:
This is a personal, responsive company that really understands what warehousing software needs to provide. Unlike the competitors, the workflows are user-centric. If you are packing, you see only the information you need to efficiently pack. Likewise with picking, receiving and every other warehouse operation.
Customer service is handled via online chat and they are FAST. If you have a question, they respond with an answer within minutes. No more down time while waiting for tickets!
Hands down the best value in this category.

classification.summary: Customer praises Saltbox's user-centric warehouse workflows, fast customer service, and competitive pricing compared to unnamed competitors.

content.body:
If your store does over $10million a year in revenue, talk to ShipHero. They are the kings.
A few things I love about ShipHero
It's an all-in solution including inventory management, cross-channel syncing, returns management, order management and shipping including built in barcoding and integrations with the shipping carriers.
Scale. ShipHero can handle those sale days when you do 10,000 orders in a day with no sweat. If you go through the list of the 25 largest Shopify stores, several use ShipHero. If you're big, no one can compete with ShipHero.
Reliability. The system works and you don't have to deal with things not working or going slow all the time.
It's powerful. Automation rules, multi warehouse support including routing between multiple of your own facilities and outside 3PLs (those 3PLs have to be using ShipHero, and a ton are). The ability to set permissions for different users. Auditing so you know who did what when. And I'm sure I'm missing a bunch of other points.
The integration with Shopify is awesome, syncing details on returns, refunds, products and order.
And maybe best of all, the team knows their stuff and will get you onboarded and set up.

classification.summary: Author praises ShipHero as the superior solution for high-volume ecommerce stores over $10M revenue, highlighting its scalability, reliability, and all-in-one capabilities.

content.body: One of the excellent options for fulfillment. They really friendly and helpful. Service and delivery are top notch. Go for it.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's fulfillment service, friendly staff, and delivery quality.

content.body:
We are very happy with shiphero! We did tons of research on all the inventory apps available which led to shiphero and sku labs. We installed both apps and did a series of tests finding that shiphero had a lot more features for inventory management and shipping. Shiphero is great to get started with inventory management with plenty of room for growth. Their mobile app is great also for sending shipments in just a few clicks.
Here are a few things that we really like about the app:1) We store pdf's within the sku's for technical drawings (would love it if we could upload other files, currently just have the ability for images and pdf's)2) We have nested kits so we know every individual part that makes up our products. Also allows for effortless inventory tracking.3) We have an automation rule set to use a customers shipping account when they place an order and our shipping account for regular customers. We also have automation rules set to prioritize shipments.4) We set up vendors for different departments of our business to send purchase orders when we need to manufacture more of our products.5) Any questions or help we need they are very quick to respond with knowledgeable people on the other end.6) All outgoing orders are quickly barcode scanned for accuracy with visibility showing that the packer did his job correctly.
I highly recommend this app. Their product and service is so great that I had to take the time to give them a great review for all their hard work!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipHero user provides detailed praise for the platform's inventory management, automation, and customer service features.

content.body:
I would give ShipHero 6 stars if I could!
Easy to use software right out of the box. Same look and feel as Shopify, so there's  limited training needed.
It fits the needs of our large 8-figure turnover company with 50+ employees, covering everything from Wholesale, Goods In, Barcode Readers, Different User Access Levels, iPad App for even easier access and use, easy plug-n-play with Shopify, and the best help and support you could wish for. Fast, prompt and genuinely helpful.
We looked at all of the other solutions, and ShipHero was by far the best value for money. They're difficult to beat.
DW, CMO, WigOutlet.com

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising ShipHero's software capabilities and support for their large ecommerce business, not expressing any need for alternative solutions.
